name: Tom Fitton
subject: Students Taught MAGA is "White Supremacy"!
body:
What Are Pelosi and Biden Admin Hiding About Jan 6?

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES PENTAGON AND PARK POLICE OVER JAN. 6 CAPITOL
DEPLOYMENT

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24962&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1FaEQ0Q2dvUS0yNCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUyMjAwMjgxMg==]

Nancy Pelosi wants to set up a commission to continue the
politicization of events at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, saying
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24963&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvcGVsb3NpLWJpcGFydGlzYW4tamFuLTYtY2FwaXRvbC1yaW90LWNvbW1pc3Npb24tcmVwdWJsaWNhbnMtYWZyYWlkLXRydXRoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTIyMDAyODEy]
that those who oppose her “are afraid of the truth.”

That’s laughable. Getting to the truth is our specialty, and so we
filed Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suits against the Department
of the Interior and the Department of Defense for records regarding
the deployment of armed forces around the Capitol complex in
Washington, D.C., in January and February of 2021 (_Judicial Watch v.
U.S. Department of the Interior_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24928&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaW50ZXJpb3ItZGMtdHJvb3BzLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTMwMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=]
(No.
1:21-cv-01302)) and (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Defense_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24926&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9kLWRjLXRyb29wcy1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDEzMDEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTIyMDAyODEy]
(No. 1:21-cv-01301)).

Who needs a “commission” when you have trusty Judicial Watch!

We sued here in DC after the Department of Defense failed to reply to
our February 19, 2021, FOIA request for:

All emails regarding the deployment of U.S. troops around the Capitol
complex in Washington, D.C. sent to and from Secretary of Defense
Lloyd Austin, Deputy Secretary Kathleen H. Hicks, Joint Chiefs
Chairman Gen. Mark A. Milley, and/or Vice Chairman Gen. John E. Hyten.

We’re interested in emails sent between January 6, 2021, and
February 19, 2021.

We sued the Department of the Interior after the U.S. Park Police, one
of its components, failed to reply to a March 18, 2021, FOIA
request for:

All records of communications, including emails and text messages,
between officials of the U.S. Park Police and officials of the
Washington, D.C. Metropolitan Police Department regarding the Jan. 6,
2021 pro-Trump rally and/or protest at the Capitol Building.

All records of communications, including emails and text messages,
between officials of the U.S. Park Police and officials of the Federal
Bureau of Investigation regarding the Jan. 6, 2021 pro-Trump rally
and/or protest at the Capitol Building.

All records of communications, including emails and text messages,
between officials of the U.S. Park Police and officials of the U.S.
Capitol Police regarding the Jan. 6, 2021 pro-Trump rally and/or
protest at the Capitol Building.

All records of communications, including emails and text messages,
between officials of the U.S. Park Police and officials of the offices
of the House and Senate Sergeants-at-Arms regarding the Jan. 6, 2021
pro-Trump rally and/or protest at the Capitol Building.

All intelligence reports, memoranda, updates, and warnings received by
the U.S. Park Police regarding the Jan. 6, 2021 pro-Trump rally and/or
protest at the Capitol Building.

The timeframe for this request is December 1, 2020, to January 31,
2021.

We are deeply troubled that the U.S. Park Police and the Pentagon are
suppressing the many unknown facts surrounding the January 6 incident
at the U.S. Capitol. With those emotionally charged events shaping the
political landscape, it is critical that the American people have a
full account of the facts. It is disturbing that we must take the two
government agencies to federal court for this basic information.

We filed several lawsuits previously regarding the January 6 incident.

* In March 2021, we filed suit against the U.S. Department of
Defense for records about House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s January 8,
2021, telephone call with Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Mark
Milley.
* Pressure from a March 2021 Judicial Watch lawsuit helped bring
to light that Capitol Police Officer Brian Sicknick died of natural
causes.
* In February 2021, we announced a lawsuit against the Capitol
Police for emails and video related to the January 6 riot.

If Ms. Pelosi wants the truth, she can follow developments in these
lawsuits. In the meantime, as I told Newsmax
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24964&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1MeEkzVUgyZWNzZyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUyMjAwMjgxMg==]
this week, you should be
very concerned that any Pelosi commission will be used to target and
abuse any and all Americans who oppose the radical left agenda.

STUDENTS TAUGHT THAT ‘MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN’ IS ‘COVERT WHITE
SUPREMACY’

You need to be concerned about our public schools. Maryland shows us
why. We received 685 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24938&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3RhZ3MvbWNwcy1hbnRpLXJhY2lzbS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=]
of
heavily redacted records from Montgomery County Public Schools (MCPS),
including documents related to their “Anti-racist system audit”
and critical race theory classes.

The documents, obtained under the Maryland Public Information Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24939&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWFyeWxhbmRhdHRvcm5leWdlbmVyYWwuZ292L1BhZ2VzL09wZW5Hb3YvcGlhLmFzcHg/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=],
reveal
that students of “Maryland’s Largest School District” who
attended Thomas Pyle Middle School’s social justice class were
taught that the phrase “Make America Great Again” was an example
of “covert white supremacy.” The phrase is ranked on a pyramid
just below, “lynching,” “hate crimes,” “the N-word” and
“racial slurs.” They were also taught that “white privilege”
means being favored by school authorities and having a positive
relationship with the police.

Additionally, the documents show
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24940&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzLzIwMjEvMDUvTUNQUy1BbnRpLVJhY2lzdC1BdWRpdC0yMDIxLXBncy01Ni02MC5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=]
that
Montgomery County Public Schools allocated over $454,000 for an
“Anti-racist system audit” by The Mid-Atlantic Equity Consortium,
a company that claims that their “expertise in using
intersectionality as part of its theory of change makes us uniquely
positioned to conduct the Anti-Racist Audit and mitigate the root
causes of systemic barriers.”

In Thomas Pyle Middle School’s “social justice” class course
curriculum, there is a slide titled “What is systemic racism?
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24941&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Rob21hcy1weWxlLW1jcHMtMjAyMS1wZ3MtNDQtNDUvXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUyMjAwMjgxMg==
in which students are shown a pyramid slide depicting “Differences
between overt and covert hateful white supremacy.” According to the
pyramid, “Make America Great Again” is an example of “covert
white supremacy.” The phrase is ranked on a pyramid just below
“racial slurs.”

Examples of other “white supremacy” include thinking “but
we’re just one human family,” “colorblindness,” “cultural
appropriation,” “celebration of Columbus Day,” “police
murdering POC [people of color],” and “bootstrap theory.”

A separate pyramid begins with the term “genocide
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24942&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Rob21hcy1weWxlLW1jcHMtcmVjb3Jkcy0yMDIxLXBnLTkvXS7igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=

The documents include Mid-Atlantic Equity Consortium’s
“anti-racist system audit” proposal
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24943&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21jcHMtYW50aS1yYWNpc3QtYXVkaXQtMjAyMS1wZy0zNDEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTIyMDAyODEy],
which describes intersectional theory as “people are often
disadvantaged by multiple sources of oppression: their race, class,
gender identity, native language, sexual orientation, religion, and
other identity markers. Intersectionality recognizes that identity
markers (e.g. “female” and “Black”) do not exist independently
of each other, and that each informs the others, often creating a
complex merging of oppression.”

Records regarding Montgomery County Public School’s Thomas Pyle
Middle School’s social justice class include a cover letter, noting
that the class in question was a one-week “Summer Boost” class
called “Reading and Taking Action for Social Justice” offered from
July 13-17, 2020, and that “no grades were given and no actual work
due.” The class material includes a push for students to fill out a
form letter with contact information addressed to federal, state and
county education officials asking for more critical race theory
classes in schools.

In a slide titled “What is Intersectionality?
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24945&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Rob21hcy1weWxlLW1jcHMtMjAyMS1wZy00MC9d4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTIyMDAyODEy
the students are told it is defined as:

Exposing [one’s] multiple identities can help clarify the ways in
which a person can simultaneously experience privilege and
oppression....

Per [critical race theory scholar
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24946&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF3LmNvbHVtYmlhLmVkdS9mYWN1bHR5L2tpbWJlcmxlLXctY3JlbnNoYXc/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=]]
Kimberlé
Williams Crenshaw, ‘Intersectionality is simply a prism to see the
Interactive effects of various forms of discrimination and
disempowerment. It looks at the way that racism, many times, interacts
with patriarchy, heterosexism, classism, xenophobia – seeing that
the overlapping vulnerabilities created by these systems actually
create specific kinds of challenges.’

A class slide titled “Implicit Bias, Structural Racism” states:

Race is created to justify enslaving people from Africa (the economic
engine of the country).

National narrative (ideology, belief system) about people of color
being ‘less than’ human (and less than white) justifies
mistreatment and inequality (white supremacy).

Dominant narratives about race (family, media, society) coupled with
racialized structural arrangements and differential outcomes by race
all prime us to believe that people of color are inferior to white
people ...

The students are asked: “What is White Privilege?
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24948&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Rob21hcy1weWxlLW1jcHMtMjAyMS1wZy01NC9d4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTIyMDAyODEy
and are instructed that white privilege includes, among other things:
having “a positive relationship with the police, generally;”
“soaking in media blatantly biased toward my race;” and “living
ignorant of the dire state of racism today.”

The students are suggested to view a Ted Talk interview with Patrisse
Cullors, a founder of Black Lives Matter. The class is provided
“definitions” created by www.racialequitytools.org. The terms
that are defined include:

* “Black Lives Matter,” which is defined as “A political
movement to address systemic and state violence against African
Americans.” It claims that “Black Lives Matter is an ideological
and political intervention in a world where Black lives are
systematically and intentionally targeted for demise.”
* “Power,” defined among other things as: “Wealth, whiteness,
citizenship, patriarchy, heterosexism, and education are a few key
social mechanisms through which power operates.”
* “Racist policies,” is defined with the statement, “There is
no such thing as a nonracist or race-neutral policy.”
* “White Privilege,” which is defined as “to the unquestioned
and unearned set of advantages, entitlements, benefits and choices
bestowed on people solely because they are white.” And “Structure
white privilege” is described as “A system of white domination
that creates and maintains belief systems that make current racial
advantages and disadvantages seem normal.”
* Under the heading “White Supremacy,” “White supremacy
culture,” is defined as referring, “to the dominant, unquestioned
standards of behavior and ways of functioning embodied by the vast
majority of institutions in the United States.” White supremacy
culture is further defined as “the glue that binds together
white-controlled institutions into systems and white-controlled
systems into the global white supremacy system.”
* Other defined terms include: “Anti-black” “colonization”
“racial recognition” “racialization” “structural racism”
and “whiteness”

We also received records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24949&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2dyZWVud29vZC1tY3BzLXJlY29yZHMtMjAyMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=]
relating
to Montgomery County Public School’s Greenwood Elementary School’s
“Dual Pandemic” of “Covid-19/systemic racism” class
presentation.

The racist, revolutionary claptrap in these documents should be
nowhere near a school classroom. These documents show that extremists
have access to our schools and are willing to abuse this access to
children in order to advance a dangerous, divisive, and likely illegal
agenda.

FLORIDA COUNTY GIVES ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS SPECIAL IDS TO GET VACCINES,
PUBLIC SERVICES

Leftist public officials show contempt for the rule of law when they
promote sanctuary policies to aid and abet the continued presence of
illegal aliens. The latest example comes in Florida, as our
_Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24955&F=T&].

Florida’s second-most populous county is the state’s first to
offer illegal immigrants identification cards so they can obtain
taxpayer-funded services, including COVID-19 vaccines. Elected
officials in Broward County, situated in southeast Florida with a
population of about two million, unanimously passed the measure with
ardent support from the county’s top law enforcement officer,
Sheriff Gregory Tony. Republican Governor Ron DeSantis appointed Tony
to the elected position after suspending former Broward Sheriff Scott
Israel for mishandling the 2018 shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas
High School in Parkland.

Tony won his first election in November to remain the county’s top
cop. In a social media post published by local news outlets
Tony thanked Broward County
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24965&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmJjbWlhbWkuY29tL25ld3MvcG9saXRpY3MvZGVjaXNpb24tMjAyMC9ncmVnb3J5LXRvbnktd2lucy1yYWNlLXRvLXJlbWFpbi1icm93YXJkLXNoZXJpZmYvMjMxNjEwMC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=].
“Together, we did this. I look forward to leading the great &
hard-working people at the Broward Sheriff’s Office over the next
four years as we continue to make BSO the finest law enforcement
agency in Florida and an example of excellence for the nation,” Tony
wrote. The sheriff fully backs the new ID cards for illegal immigrants
and says they will have a positive impact on public safety, according
to a local news report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24966&F=T&].
Tony even wrote a letter of support to the Broward County commissioner
who introduced the legislation to create the special IDs for those in
the country illegally. This may seem strange considering he
runs Florida’s
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24967&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2hlcmlmZi5vcmcvUGFnZXMvSG9tZS5hc3B4P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTIyMDAyODEy]
largest
sheriff’s department with 5,400 employees, including nearly 3,000
certified deputies. “Today, Broward County has thousands of
residents who lack identification for various reasons,” Sheriff
Tony’s letter to the commissioner reads. “With the homeless,
undocumented, formerly incarcerated, to elderly, these and other
bureaucratically-challenged residents do not have access to many basic
and vital services. The community ID will provide these residents with
a way to access those services.”

Support for the special IDs from the top law enforcement official in
one of its largest counties is at odds with the state’s typically
strong stance on illegal immigration. Florida is not one of the
nation’s 11 states to offer illegal aliens sanctuary and no local
government in the Sunshine state officially provides it either, though
some have toyed with idea. Florida has also resisted a nationwide
movement to provide illegal immigrants with driver’s licenses.
Sixteen states along with the District of Columbia offer illegal
immigrants driver’s licenses, according to the National Conference
of State Legislatures
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24968&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmNzbC5vcmcvcmVzZWFyY2gvaW1taWdyYXRpb24vc3RhdGVzLW9mZmVyaW5nLWRyaXZlci1zLWxpY2Vuc2VzLXRvLWltbWlncmFudHMuYXNweD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUyMjAwMjgxMg==].
Among the states are California, New York, Oregon, Nevada, Vermont,
Washington State and Connecticut. In 2020 Virginia became the latest
to grant illegal aliens driving privileges. Many open borders groups
have expressed concern that the information on the licenses will be
shared with federal authorities.

To protect the privacy of illegal immigrants Broward County will not
issue the special IDs, but rather a nonprofit will carry out the task
to avoid potential public records requests. Technically the cards are
called “community IDs” and a third-party issues them with the
approval of local governments. It allows the personal information of
recipients to be kept private because nonprofits typically do not have
to comply with public records laws like cities, counties, states, and
other taxpayer-funded entities. The Broward County community IDs will
be issued by Legal Aid Service of Broward County
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24969&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJvd2FyZGxlZ2FsYWlkLm9yZy93aG8td2UtYXJlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUyMjAwMjgxMg==],
a group that provides
free legal advice and representation to the county’s
“disadvantaged,” including illegal immigrants. The group helps
improve the lifestyle and living conditions in low-income communities
and encourages self-sufficiency, according to its website.

It is not clear how Legal Aid was chosen to administer Broward
County’s new ID cards, but the measure to do so was passed after a
“months-long campaign of advocacy and outreach by a diverse
coalition of community organizations,” a local news article
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24970&F=T&.
Predictably, the groups advocate for open borders and rights for
illegal aliens. They include United We Dream, Florida Immigrant
Coalition, Hispanic Unity of Florida, and the Southern Poverty Law
Center (SPLC). It is noteworthy to mention that the SPLC is a radical
leftist nonprofit that lists conservative organizations that disagree
with it on social issues on a catalog of “hate groups.” Its famous
“hate map” helped a gunman commit an act of terrorism against a
conservative nonprofit in 2012. The Virginia man, Floyd Lee Corkins
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24971&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29ycnVwdGlvbi1jaHJvbmljbGVzL2ZyYy1zaG9vdGVyLWdldHMtMjUteWVhcnMtZmVkcy1jYWxsLWl0LWFjdC1vZi10ZXJyb3Jpc20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTIyMDAyODEy],
was sentenced to 25 years in prison though prosecutors recommended 45
because his crime was an act of terrorism. Even the Obama Department
of Justice (DOJ) officially reprimanded the SPLC for its hateful
attacks, documents
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=20880&F=T&]
obtained
by Judicial Watch show.

RISING CRIME, RADICAL AGENDA TEST LEFT

It’s been said that as New York City goes, so goes the nation. That
would be tragic. These days, New York City is a radical sandbox that
results in policies that threaten the safety and welfare of
law-abiding citizens. Micah Morrison, our chief investigative
reporter, has a revealing update
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24958&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9yaXNpbmctY3JpbWUtcmFkaWNhbC1hZ2VuZGEtdGVzdC1sZWZ0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUyMjAwMjgxMg==]
in Judicial Watch’s _Investigative Bulletin_:

With weeks to go to elections that will decide New York City’s next
mayor and the powerful post of Manhattan district attorney, rising
crime suddenly is at the center of the political action. The stakes
are high—and not just for New York.

The proximate cause for the sudden focus on crime was a shooting in
the heart of the city—a gunman let loose with a fusillade in Times
Square
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24929&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hYmM3bnkuY29tL3RpbWVzLXNxdWFyZS1zaG9vdGluZy1pbi1ueWMtMTUxNS1icm9hZHdheS8xMDYyMDQ3Ni8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=],
wounding a 4-year-old girl, a woman from New Jersey, and a tourist
from Rhode Island. But that was just gas on the bonfire. Judicial
Watch followers are familiar with the grim litany of rising crime
statistics
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=22567&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9jcmltZS1zdXJnZXMtYXMtcHJvZ3Jlc3NpdmUtcG9saWNpZXMtZ2Fpbi1ncm91bmQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTIyMDAyODEy]
in
New York and across urban America.

“As of May 2,” the New York Times reported, “132 people have
been killed compared with 113 this same time last year, a 17 percent
increase, according to Police Department statistics. There have been
416 shooting incidents compared with 227 this time last year, an 83
percent increase.” Violent subway crimes
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24930&F=T&]
rattle
the city. Hate crimes continue to rise
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24931&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVjcmltZXJlcG9ydC5vcmcvMjAyMS8wNS8wNC9uZXcteW9yay1jaXR5LWhhdGUtY3JpbWUtbnVtYmVycy1jb250aW51ZS10by1yaXNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUyMjAwMjgxMg==].

Rising crime poses a big problem for the Left, which nationwide has
pushed hard on criminal-justice issues with calls to defund the police
and empty the jails. In New York, a draft platform from a coalition of
radical left-wing groups, obtained by Judicial Watch
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24932&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3JhZGljYWwtY3JpbWluYWwtanVzdGljZS1wbGF0Zm9ybS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=],
suggests the scope of the Left’s national agenda.

The crowded New York mayoral and DA races are Democratic Party
primaries that will be decided June 22 in a city dominated by
Democrats, effectively anointing the winners. Both races have tacked
sharply to the left, with most of the DA candidates backing most of
the radical platform, and the mayoral candidates echoing its themes.

The platform calls for defunding the Manhattan DA’s office, sharp
reductions in charging and sentencing discretion, curtailing gang
prosecutions and intelligence gathering, ending support for
police-sponsored community programs, declining disorderly conduct
prosecutions, and stopping pre-trial detention.

It’s class war on the criminal justice system. The platform calls
for a fifty percent reduction in the district attorney’s budget
because “for too long” the office “has worked to extract wealth
from the targets of policing and incarceration.” It says that the DA
“continues to pursue overzealous charges and excessive sentences”
and that there must be a commitment to “reducing the power of the
office.”

The attack on the office of district attorney is an attack on policing
as well. The DA’s office, the draft platform says, “is heavily
intertwined with and dependent on other law enforcement entities,
including the NYPD.” Charging of violent offenders must be changed
because “the label ‘violent’...is applied in arbitrary, biased,
and harmful ways that do nothing to address the root causes of
violence.” Gang prosecutions must be ended because the “cases have
been built through close collaboration with the NYPD as it has
expanded its racist and controversial gang database.”

Gang violence, by the way, is widely identified as a central cause of
shootings and killings in New York. And recent state legislation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=17990&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9wcm9ncmVzc2l2ZS1wb2xpY3ktZHJpdmVzLXJpc2luZy1jcmltZS1pbi1uZXcteW9yay8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=]
already
has sharply reduced jail populations.

But lately it seems that urban America is tiring of rising crime and
disorder. The public mood appears to be shifting. In a recent New
York poll
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24933&F=T&],
crime placed second in public concern, after Covid-19.

In recent years, the criminal-justice reform movement, backed by the
George Soros network
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24934&F=T&],
has made powerful gains around the country. Left-wing district
attorneys are now installed in Chicago, Boston, San Francisco,
Philadelphia, and other cities. The New York races, while dominated by
the city’s noisy progressive factions, feature a handful of relative
moderates, such as mayoral candidate Eric Adams and DA contender Tali
Farhadian Weinstein, who have pushed back against the Left’s
excesses. Polling is sparse, but both seem to be gaining ground. Read
more about the races here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24935&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9iYWxsb3RwZWRpYS5vcmcvTWF5b3JhbF9lbGVjdGlvbl9pbl9OZXdfWW9yayxfTmV3X1lvcmtfKDIwMjE/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=)]
and here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55738&L=24936&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYW1ueS5jb20vbmV3cy8yMDIxLWVsZWN0aW9ucy13aG9zLXJ1bm5pbmctdG8tYmVjb21lLW1hbmhhdHRhbnMtbmV4dC1kaXN0cmljdC1hdHRvcm5leS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MjIwMDI4MTI=].

Victory for any moderate would signal that the public pushback against
rising crime is gaining traction. Victory for any of the other
candidates would signal something entirely different—that the
leftward march in American cities continues.

Until next week ...

clean_body: What Are Pelosi and Biden Admin Hiding About Jan 6? [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES PENTAGON AND PARK POLICE OVER JAN. 6 CAPITOL DEPLOYMENT [==] Nancy Pelosi wants to set up a commission to continue the politicization of events at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, saying [] that those who oppose her “are afraid of the truth.” That’s laughable. Getting to the truth is our specialty, and so we filed Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suits against the Department of the Interior and the Department of Defense for records regarding the deployment of armed forces around the Capitol complex in Washington, D.C., in January and February of 2021 (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of the Interior [=] (No. 1:21-cv-01302)) and (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Defense [] (No. 1:21-cv-01301)). Who needs a “commission” when you have trusty Judicial Watch! We sued here in DC after the Department of Defense failed to reply to our February 19, 2021, FOIA request for: All emails regarding the deployment of U.S. troops around the Capitol complex in Washington, D.C. sent to and from Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin, Deputy Secretary Kathleen H. Hicks, Joint Chiefs Chairman Gen. Mark A. Milley, and/or Vice Chairman Gen. John E. Hyten. We’re interested in emails sent between January 6, 2021, and February 19, 2021. We sued the Department of the Interior after the U.S. Park Police, one of its components, failed to reply to a March 18, 2021, FOIA request for: All records of communications, including emails and text messages, between officials of the U.S. Park Police and officials of the Washington, D.C. Metropolitan Police Department regarding the Jan. 6, 2021 pro-Trump rally and/or protest at the Capitol Building. All records of communications, including emails and text messages, between officials of the U.S. Park Police and officials of the Federal Bureau of Investigation regarding the Jan. 6, 2021 pro-Trump rally and/or protest at the Capitol Building. All records of communications, including emails and text messages, between officials of the U.S. Park Police and officials of the U.S. Capitol Police regarding the Jan. 6, 2021 pro-Trump rally and/or protest at the Capitol Building. All records of communications, including emails and text messages, between officials of the U.S. Park Police and officials of the offices of the House and Senate Sergeants-at-Arms regarding the Jan. 6, 2021 pro-Trump rally and/or protest at the Capitol Building. All intelligence reports, memoranda, updates, and warnings received by the U.S. Park Police regarding the Jan. 6, 2021 pro-Trump rally and/or protest at the Capitol Building. The timeframe for this request is December 1, 2020, to January 31, 2021. We are deeply troubled that the U.S. Park Police and the Pentagon are suppressing the many unknown facts surrounding the January 6 incident at the U.S. Capitol. With those emotionally charged events shaping the political landscape, it is critical that the American people have a full account of the facts. It is disturbing that we must take the two government agencies to federal court for this basic information. We filed several lawsuits previously regarding the January 6 incident. In March 2021, we filed suit against the U.S. Department of Defense for records about House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s January 8, 2021, telephone call with Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Mark Milley. Pressure from a March 2021 Judicial Watch lawsuit helped bring to light that Capitol Police Officer Brian Sicknick died of natural causes. In February 2021, we announced a lawsuit against the Capitol Police for emails and video related to the January 6 riot. If Ms. Pelosi wants the truth, she can follow developments in these lawsuits. In the meantime, as I told Newsmax [==] this week, you should be very concerned that any Pelosi commission will be used to target and abuse any and all Americans who oppose the radical left agenda. STUDENTS TAUGHT THAT ‘MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN’ IS ‘COVERT WHITE SUPREMACY’ You need to be concerned about our public schools. Maryland shows us why. We received 685 pages [=] of heavily redacted records from Montgomery County Public Schools (MCPS), including documents related to their “Anti-racist system audit” and critical race theory classes. The documents, obtained under the Maryland Public Information Act [=], reveal that students of “Maryland’s Largest School District” who attended Thomas Pyle Middle School’s social justice class were taught that the phrase “Make America Great Again” was an example of “covert white supremacy.” The phrase is ranked on a pyramid just below, “lynching,” “hate crimes,” “the N-word” and “racial slurs.” They were also taught that “white privilege” means being favored by school authorities and having a positive relationship with the police. Additionally, the documents show [=] that Montgomery County Public Schools allocated over $454,000 for an “Anti-racist system audit” by The Mid-Atlantic Equity Consortium, a company that claims that their “expertise in using intersectionality as part of its theory of change makes us uniquely positioned to conduct the Anti-Racist Audit and mitigate the root causes of systemic barriers.” In Thomas Pyle Middle School’s “social justice” class course curriculum, there is a slide titled “What is systemic racism? [== in which students are shown a pyramid slide depicting “Differences between overt and covert hateful white supremacy.” According to the pyramid, “Make America Great Again” is an example of “covert white supremacy.” The phrase is ranked on a pyramid just below “racial slurs.” Examples of other “white supremacy” include thinking “but we’re just one human family,” “colorblindness,” “cultural appropriation,” “celebration of Columbus Day,” “police murdering POC [people of color],” and “bootstrap theory.” A separate pyramid begins with the term “genocide [= The documents include Mid-Atlantic Equity Consortium’s “anti-racist system audit” proposal [], which describes intersectional theory as “people are often disadvantaged by multiple sources of oppression: their race, class, gender identity, native language, sexual orientation, religion, and other identity markers. Intersectionality recognizes that identity markers (e.g. “female” and “Black”) do not exist independently of each other, and that each informs the others, often creating a complex merging of oppression.” Records regarding Montgomery County Public School’s Thomas Pyle Middle School’s social justice class include a cover letter, noting that the class in question was a one-week “Summer Boost” class called “Reading and Taking Action for Social Justice” offered from July 13-17, 2020, and that “no grades were given and no actual work due.” The class material includes a push for students to fill out a form letter with contact information addressed to federal, state and county education officials asking for more critical race theory classes in schools. In a slide titled “What is Intersectionality? [ the students are told it is defined as: Exposing [one’s] multiple identities can help clarify the ways in which a person can simultaneously experience privilege and oppression.... Per [critical race theory scholar [=]] Kimberlé Williams Crenshaw, ‘Intersectionality is simply a prism to see the Interactive effects of various forms of discrimination and disempowerment. It looks at the way that racism, many times, interacts with patriarchy, heterosexism, classism, xenophobia – seeing that the overlapping vulnerabilities created by these systems actually create specific kinds of challenges.’ A class slide titled “Implicit Bias, Structural Racism” states: Race is created to justify enslaving people from Africa (the economic engine of the country). National narrative (ideology, belief system) about people of color being ‘less than’ human (and less than white) justifies mistreatment and inequality (white supremacy). Dominant narratives about race (family, media, society) coupled with racialized structural arrangements and differential outcomes by race all prime us to believe that people of color are inferior to white people ... The students are asked: “What is White Privilege? [ and are instructed that white privilege includes, among other things: having “a positive relationship with the police, generally;” “soaking in media blatantly biased toward my race;” and “living ignorant of the dire state of racism today.” The students are suggested to view a Ted Talk interview with Patrisse Cullors, a founder of Black Lives Matter. The class is provided “definitions” created by www.racialequitytools.org. The terms that are defined include: “Black Lives Matter,” which is defined as “A political movement to address systemic and state violence against African Americans.” It claims that “Black Lives Matter is an ideological and political intervention in a world where Black lives are systematically and intentionally targeted for demise.” “Power,” defined among other things as: “Wealth, whiteness, citizenship, patriarchy, heterosexism, and education are a few key social mechanisms through which power operates.” “Racist policies,” is defined with the statement, “There is no such thing as a nonracist or race-neutral policy.” “White Privilege,” which is defined as “to the unquestioned and unearned set of advantages, entitlements, benefits and choices bestowed on people solely because they are white.” And “Structure white privilege” is described as “A system of white domination that creates and maintains belief systems that make current racial advantages and disadvantages seem normal.” Under the heading “White Supremacy,” “White supremacy culture,” is defined as referring, “to the dominant, unquestioned standards of behavior and ways of functioning embodied by the vast majority of institutions in the United States.” White supremacy culture is further defined as “the glue that binds together white-controlled institutions into systems and white-controlled systems into the global white supremacy system.” * Other defined terms include: “Anti-black” “colonization” “racial recognition” “racialization” “structural racism” and “whiteness” We also received records [=] relating to Montgomery County Public School’s Greenwood Elementary School’s “Dual Pandemic” of “Covid-19/systemic racism” class presentation. The racist, revolutionary claptrap in these documents should be nowhere near a school classroom. These documents show that extremists have access to our schools and are willing to abuse this access to children in order to advance a dangerous, divisive, and likely illegal agenda. FLORIDA COUNTY GIVES ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS SPECIAL IDS TO GET VACCINES, PUBLIC SERVICES Leftist public officials show contempt for the rule of law when they promote sanctuary policies to aid and abet the continued presence of illegal aliens. The latest example comes in Florida, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. Florida’s second-most populous county is the state’s first to offer illegal immigrants identification cards so they can obtain taxpayer-funded services, including COVID-19 vaccines. Elected officials in Broward County, situated in southeast Florida with a population of about two million, unanimously passed the measure with ardent support from the county’s top law enforcement officer, Sheriff Gregory Tony. Republican Governor Ron DeSantis appointed Tony to the elected position after suspending former Broward Sheriff Scott Israel for mishandling the 2018 shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland. Tony won his first election in November to remain the county’s top cop. In a social media post published by local news outlets Tony thanked Broward County [=]. “Together, we did this. I look forward to leading the great & hard-working people at the Broward Sheriff’s Office over the next four years as we continue to make BSO the finest law enforcement agency in Florida and an example of excellence for the nation,” Tony wrote. The sheriff fully backs the new ID cards for illegal immigrants and says they will have a positive impact on public safety, according to a local news report []. Tony even wrote a letter of support to the Broward County commissioner who introduced the legislation to create the special IDs for those in the country illegally. This may seem strange considering he runs Florida’s [] largest sheriff’s department with 5,400 employees, including nearly 3,000 certified deputies. “Today, Broward County has thousands of residents who lack identification for various reasons,” Sheriff Tony’s letter to the commissioner reads. “With the homeless, undocumented, formerly incarcerated, to elderly, these and other bureaucratically-challenged residents do not have access to many basic and vital services. The community ID will provide these residents with a way to access those services.” Support for the special IDs from the top law enforcement official in one of its largest counties is at odds with the state’s typically strong stance on illegal immigration. Florida is not one of the nation’s 11 states to offer illegal aliens sanctuary and no local government in the Sunshine state officially provides it either, though some have toyed with idea. Florida has also resisted a nationwide movement to provide illegal immigrants with driver’s licenses. Sixteen states along with the District of Columbia offer illegal immigrants driver’s licenses, according to the National Conference of State Legislatures [==]. Among the states are California, New York, Oregon, Nevada, Vermont, Washington State and Connecticut. In 2020 Virginia became the latest to grant illegal aliens driving privileges. Many open borders groups have expressed concern that the information on the licenses will be shared with federal authorities. To protect the privacy of illegal immigrants Broward County will not issue the special IDs, but rather a nonprofit will carry out the task to avoid potential public records requests. Technically the cards are called “community IDs” and a third-party issues them with the approval of local governments. It allows the personal information of recipients to be kept private because nonprofits typically do not have to comply with public records laws like cities, counties, states, and other taxpayer-funded entities. The Broward County community IDs will be issued by Legal Aid Service of Broward County [==], a group that provides free legal advice and representation to the county’s “disadvantaged,” including illegal immigrants. The group helps improve the lifestyle and living conditions in low-income communities and encourages self-sufficiency, according to its website. It is not clear how Legal Aid was chosen to administer Broward County’s new ID cards, but the measure to do so was passed after a “months-long campaign of advocacy and outreach by a diverse coalition of community organizations,” a local news article [==. Predictably, the groups advocate for open borders and rights for illegal aliens. They include United We Dream, Florida Immigrant Coalition, Hispanic Unity of Florida, and the Southern Poverty Law Center (SPLC). It is noteworthy to mention that the SPLC is a radical leftist nonprofit that lists conservative organizations that disagree with it on social issues on a catalog of “hate groups.” Its famous “hate map” helped a gunman commit an act of terrorism against a conservative nonprofit in 2012. The Virginia man, Floyd Lee Corkins [], was sentenced to 25 years in prison though prosecutors recommended 45 because his crime was an act of terrorism. Even the Obama Department of Justice (DOJ) officially reprimanded the SPLC for its hateful attacks, documents [=] obtained by Judicial Watch show. RISING CRIME, RADICAL AGENDA TEST LEFT It’s been said that as New York City goes, so goes the nation. That would be tragic. These days, New York City is a radical sandbox that results in policies that threaten the safety and welfare of law-abiding citizens. Micah Morrison, our chief investigative reporter, has a revealing update [==] in Judicial Watch’s Investigative Bulletin: With weeks to go to elections that will decide New York City’s next mayor and the powerful post of Manhattan district attorney, rising crime suddenly is at the center of the political action. The stakes are high—and not just for New York. The proximate cause for the sudden focus on crime was a shooting in the heart of the city—a gunman let loose with a fusillade in Times Square [=], wounding a 4-year-old girl, a woman from New Jersey, and a tourist from Rhode Island. But that was just gas on the bonfire. Judicial Watch followers are familiar with the grim litany of rising crime statistics [] in New York and across urban America. “As of May 2,” the New York Times reported, “132 people have been killed compared with 113 this same time last year, a 17 percent increase, according to Police Department statistics. There have been 416 shooting incidents compared with 227 this time last year, an 83 percent increase.” Violent subway crimes [=] rattle the city. Hate crimes continue to rise [==]. Rising crime poses a big problem for the Left, which nationwide has pushed hard on criminal-justice issues with calls to defund the police and empty the jails. In New York, a draft platform from a coalition of radical left-wing groups, obtained by Judicial Watch [=], suggests the scope of the Left’s national agenda. The crowded New York mayoral and DA races are Democratic Party primaries that will be decided June 22 in a city dominated by Democrats, effectively anointing the winners. Both races have tacked sharply to the left, with most of the DA candidates backing most of the radical platform, and the mayoral candidates echoing its themes. The platform calls for defunding the Manhattan DA’s office, sharp reductions in charging and sentencing discretion, curtailing gang prosecutions and intelligence gathering, ending support for police-sponsored community programs, declining disorderly conduct prosecutions, and stopping pre-trial detention. It’s class war on the criminal justice system. The platform calls for a fifty percent reduction in the district attorney’s budget because “for too long” the office “has worked to extract wealth from the targets of policing and incarceration.” It says that the DA “continues to pursue overzealous charges and excessive sentences” and that there must be a commitment to “reducing the power of the office.” The attack on the office of district attorney is an attack on policing as well. The DA’s office, the draft platform says, “is heavily intertwined with and dependent on other law enforcement entities, including the NYPD.” Charging of violent offenders must be changed because “the label ‘violent’...is applied in arbitrary, biased, and harmful ways that do nothing to address the root causes of violence.” Gang prosecutions must be ended because the “cases have been built through close collaboration with the NYPD as it has expanded its racist and controversial gang database.” Gang violence, by the way, is widely identified as a central cause of shootings and killings in New York. And recent state legislation [=] already has sharply reduced jail populations. But lately it seems that urban America is tiring of rising crime and disorder. The public mood appears to be shifting. In a recent New York poll [==], crime placed second in public concern, after Covid-19. In recent years, the criminal-justice reform movement, backed by the George Soros network [=], has made powerful gains around the country. Left-wing district attorneys are now installed in Chicago, Boston, San Francisco, Philadelphia, and other cities. The New York races, while dominated by the city’s noisy progressive factions, feature a handful of relative moderates, such as mayoral candidate Eric Adams and DA contender Tali Farhadian Weinstein, who have pushed back against the Left’s excesses. Polling is sparse, but both seem to be gaining ground. Read more about the races here [=)] and here [=]. Victory for any moderate would signal that the public pushback against rising crime is gaining traction. Victory for any of the other candidates would signal something entirely different—that the leftward march in American cities continues. Until next week ... "If our elections aren't truly fair, we aren't truly free."
_Catherine Engelbrecht, Founder and President, True the Vote_
---
|
---
| |
## Eyes On | Senate S1 Trojan Horse Bill
_by Dan Gelernter, True the Vote_ **Two bills, one plan.** Senate bill S1 is designed to invalidate state-level voter ID, signature matching, and anti-ballot harvesting laws and hand control of elections over to the federal government. This bill, whose equivalent has already been passed out of the House on a party-line vote, is "the most radical legislation the Senate has considered in the nine years I've been here," [according to Senator Ted Cruz](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d331f6357c&e=ad8cba7e98) (R-TX), and “the most dangerous legislation pending before the United States Congress.” S1 is also a trojan horse, designed to be so radical that it makes other dangerous election laws look moderate by comparison. The plan is working: NBC reported this week that Senators Machin (D-WV) and Murkowski (R-AK) have asked Congress to reintroduce the [John Lewis Voting Rights Act](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=556bed27b1&e=ad8cba7e98), which would be almost as destructive as S1: It would strip states of their right to control their own election integrity laws, requiring that state laws receive “pre-clearance” from the Department of Justice. For proponents of vote fraud, this is a win-win situation: Either they get S1, or they get the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. In either case, states lose their ability to protect voters from fraud and abuse, and elections become a rubber-stamp for the federal bureaucracy. **We must act now to stop this legislation...** [**READ MORE ON THIS FROM TRUE THE VOTE NEWS**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=9c425f5751&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | [SUPPORT ELECTION INTEGRITY WITH TRUE THE VOTE](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=8e658ba4cb&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
|
---
|
## Latest Legislation
**NJ A5774 - Vote by mail from overseas**
New Jersey Assembly Bill 5774, a partisan Republican-sponsored bill, Directs Secretary of State to develop process for verifying compliance with ballot bearer rules at drop boxes; requires sharing of drop box surveillance video with campaigns and political parties.
Status: In Senate State Government Committee
[Link to Bill](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=350337b922&e=ad8cba7e98)

**NJ S3761 \- Vote by mail from overseas**
New Jersey Senate Bill 3761, a partisan Democrat-sponsored bill, would allow certain voters residing overseas to vote in any election in this State regardless of duration of overseas residency or intent to return.
Status: In Senate State Government Committee
[Link to Bill](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0b9c3b2abc&e=ad8cba7e98)

**NJ A5725 - Certificates of election**
New Jersey Assembly Bill 5725 "amends existing law to transfer responsibility for the issuance of certificates of election to county boards and successful candidates for county committee member from municipal clerks to county clerks. This will help to ensure that write-in votes, vote by mail ballots, and provisional ballots will be included in the vote count before such certificates are issued."
[Link to Bill](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=26411ff7e0&e=ad8cba7e98)

---
|
---
| | [SUPPORT ELECTION INTEGRITY WITH TRUE THE VOTE](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=daa29f7c6f&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
|
---
|
# MUST READS
**GOP Voting Laws an Attempt to Undermine Democracy**
_From Breitbart _\- Failed Georgia Democratic gubernatorial candidate Stacey Abrams said Thursday on MSNBC’s "The Last Word" that Republican state lawmakers forwarding voting legislation is a continuation of the January 6 Capitol riot "insurrection."
Abrams said, "We do need to reauthorize the Voting Rights Act because it is the only way to preclude new laws that will erode access to the right to vote. The challenge is that it’s not enough on its own. We have to be both prophylactic with this, but we also have to respond to and neutralize the bad bills that are passing at breakneck pace right now in Florida, Georgia, Arizona, Texas and now being introduced and moving with speed in Ohio and Michigan."
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=07fe46f32b&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Arizona Must Ditch Voting Machines After GOP Audit, Elections Chief Says**
_From Washington Times_ \- Voting machines from Arizona’s most populous county should not be used in the future after state Senate Republicans forced officials to give them access for an audit of 2020 election results, the state’s top elections official said Thursday. Secretary of State Katie Hobbs, a Democrat, said in a letter that Maricopa County lost control of the machines after they were handed over and doesn’t know what was done to them.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ab45cd223d&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Michigan Judge Dismisses Final Election Lawsuit Claiming Fraud**
_From Newsmax_ \- "By deciding this motion, the court is not saying that there were no problems in the way that Antrim County conducting its November 2020 elections," 13th Circuit Court Judge Kevin Elsenheimer said during a Zoom video conference of the hearing. "The clerk has admitted that there were challenges and problems in the elections, although the hand count ultimately of the presidential election showed the results were largely consistent with the canvas totals that were entered by the state and reported by the county. Nor am I saying that the processing of election data here was not corrupted or corruptible. I don't have the facts to make that determination."
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c738870dad&e=ad8cba7e98)

Find out whether your local or state party has a task force focused on securing the integrity of the next election. | | Peter,

In case you missed it, a hand-counted, full forensic analysis of 2020 ballots - what is now being called "America's Audit" \- was started up in Maricopa County here in Arizona, proving to be one of the most important accomplishments for Election Integrity to date.

**Arizona Republicans are leading the way on this front, and we are fighting for ballot transparency like nowhere else in the country!**
---
| [HELP US FINISH THE AUDIT!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57468844:62f6CAlNd:m:1:3253819041:D68922CF9DA6CB1C0AA4183D7EEED7FF:r "HELP US
FINISH THE AUDIT!")
---
| Democrats have been panicking the further along this effort goes - **they know that they can 't stop the American people from getting answers and full transparency regarding the 2020 elections! **

_**What are they trying to hide?**_

These Democrats and their media allies are working overtime to try to attack, undermine, and spread lies about America's Audit, even though the process has been non-partisan - and solely about getting to the TRUTH - from the very outset!

**Allegations of deleted databases, chain of custody issues, and other irregularities deserve to be INVESTIGATED, and we need YOU to help us uncover the facts!**

The truth is that, as long as Americans like you are in our corner fighting for transparency, nothing will stop this effort to secure what all voters should want - **full confidence that our voices are heard at the ballot box!**

name: Scott Fitzgerald / Tom Tiffany
subject: Hugo Chavez, Jimmy Carter and... Joe Biden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Give the Liberal Dream Team a WAKEUP CALL! PeterIt took Hugo Chavez years to push Venezuela's once-prosperous economy to brink of collapse. But just over 100 days into Joe Biden's term, he and Nancy Pelosi's "rubber stamp" Congress are taking our country down that same dangerous road.In a few short months, our country has gone from being a global energy powerhouse to empty service stations and Americans waiting in 1970s-style lines for gasoline.

And if we don't do something, this will only be the beginning. [That's why we need your support - today!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mkjttjd-ahkdjtlkr-r/) [[Click Here - Join Us to Stand Up to Socialism!]](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mkjttjd-ahkdjtlkr-y/) Joe Biden's failure to prevent the cyberattack on the Colonial Pipeline that has left thousands of Americans running on fumes isn't a one-off fluke. _**Remember, radicals on the Far Left have been dreaming for years of doing what those hackers just pulled off**_ : Shutting down access to affordable American energy and the pipelines that we rely on for its delivery.

Since taking office, Joe Biden shut down the Keystone XL pipeline, and moved to shut down American oil and gas development on public land. And he and his backers are just getting started. If they get their way, the gas lines and fuel shortages gripping parts of our country today could go national tomorrow.

Right next door in Michigan, radical Democrat Governor Gretchen Whitmer - who has spent more than a year strangling her state's economy - is looking to take her job-killing agenda to the next level by trying to shut down a key energy pipeline in our backyard: The Wisconsin-based Enbridge Line 5, which serves several midwestern states and our neighbors in Canada.

Here is the bottom line: Our economy depends on affordable, abundant, Made in America energy. Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's failed policies are already hitting the brakes on American jobs and opportunity - **[_and we need your help to stop them._](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mkjttjd-ahkdjtlkr-j/)**

For liberty, Congressman Scott Fitzgerald (WI-05)
Congressman Tom Tiffany (WI-07) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mkjttjd-ahkdjtlkr-t/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mkjttjd-ahkdjtlkr-i/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-mkjttjd-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-d) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-mkjttjd-ahkdjtlkr-h/)

name: Jonathan Schleifer
subject: Some no good, very bad news about our campaign in Mississippi to expand Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29578544/286847763/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzNmZmQ3Ny0wYmJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HmM_eOBIm_vA4kATfe5K50yX09DOL9Ee1BkQPuBDRRI=&emci=85348f38-75ba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=633ffd77-0bbb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=561582) Hi team, Last week, we excitedly told you about how we had just launched a ballot initiative campaign to expand Medicaid in Mississippi. It would deliver health care for over 200,000 people! After winning Medicaid expansion in six other states, you’d think it might be business as usual, but the team here has been particularly excited about the campaign in Mississippi -- the poorest state in the country. _Then the bad news hit. _ **The Mississippi Supreme Court decided a few days ago to overturn a voter-approved medical marijuana law. They basically blocked all ballot initiative campaigns in Mississippi. So we then decided with our in-state partners to suspend our campaign for Medicaid expansion.** All campaigns face setbacks, especially when working in red states. But this one hurt. _A lot._ We saw unprecedented enthusiasm for this campaign and we were thrilled to begin the work to get Medicaid expansion on the ballot after years of obstructionist politicians refusing to help those in need of care in the nation’s poorest state. But Mississippi’s Supreme Court had other ideas. I’ll spare you the wonky legal reasoning and just say this: Mississippi’s ballot initiative law, written in 1992, requires signatures to be collected evenly from all five congressional districts. The problem? Since 2000, Mississippi has only four districts. That’s it. **Our political system is not working.** Too many politicians and judges are willing to make it harder for us to vote, to participate in democracy, and to make change in our own communities. Those in power seem to prioritize scoring political points than helping those in need. _This assault on the democratic process must end. _ Our team at The Fairness Project is going to work harder than ever to break through the partisanship, cut through the noise, and make real people-powered change even with a rigged political system. We will have setbacks like this one. **But we’re going to keep fighting -- and winning.** We’ve already won Medicaid expansion through ballot initiatives in six red and purple states. We’re still hard at work on a campaign to put Medicaid expansion on the 2022 ballot in South Dakota. And we’re preparing to launch even more campaigns in the weeks and months ahead to raise wages, guarantee paid leave, reimagine public safety, and make real progress on economic, racial, and gender justice. **This is tough news. But we’re not going anywhere.** When politicians refuse to act, we keep helping the people decide on issues for ourselves -- because change can’t wait. On behalf of our whole team at The Fairness Project, thanks for being with us in this fight. We’re so grateful to have you by our side. Onward, Jonathan Schleifer
Executive Director
The Fairness Project P.S. Have any questions about this news or our work? **Reply to this email and we’ll get back to you as soon as we can. **

---

Wade -- and the new Trump-packed court is primed to take a huge swipe at access to abortion rights. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29582210/286860951/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzNjNDNmOC0xNGJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nw7079jiDf0UFIKWh7cBNiyprjiTuh3sq6PnlyY8qe8=&emci=cd011a9a-6cba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c33c43f8-14bb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) | Earlier this week, the Supreme Court announced that they will hear a case coming out of Mississippi challenging Roe v. Wade -- and the new Trump-packed court is primed to take a huge swipe at access to abortion rights. **Add your name today to urge SCOTUS to uphold Roe v Wade!**
_We need 500 more signatures from Pennsylvania to join with activists across the country_ [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29582211/286860952/1723450340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzNjNDNmOC0xNGJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nw7079jiDf0UFIKWh7cBNiyprjiTuh3sq6PnlyY8qe8=&emci=cd011a9a-6cba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c33c43f8-14bb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) This case could open the door for a total rollback of abortion rights and access to reproductive healthcare -- especially for women of color, immigrant women, and working class women. This is what anti-abortion activists have been hoping would happen for decades and why many voted for Trump. We can’t go back to the archaic time in which women didn’t have control over their bodies, forcing them back out of the workforce and into dangerous situations. [**If you’re ready to fight to protect a woman’s right to choose, add your name here to join activists across the country to stand up against this far-right war against reproductive rights!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29582212/286860953/1723450340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzNjNDNmOC0xNGJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nw7079jiDf0UFIKWh7cBNiyprjiTuh3sq6PnlyY8qe8=&emci=cd011a9a-6cba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c33c43f8-14bb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) Yours, Team Street

body:
For their own partisan game
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9748210/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk3NDgyMTA%3d&x=36e11e79)****
Friend,

**The security of our elections is at risk.**

Democrats in DC are attempting a huge power grab that gives them full control over states' ability to secure their elections.

_**Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are planning to do the following:**_

❌ OUTLAW voter ID laws
❌ Allow SIXTEEN year-olds to vote
❌ Force your tax dollars to be used for Democrat political campaigns you disagree with
❌ Override all election security laws put in place by the states

It's never been more critical to help State Republicans secure our elections.
[DEMAND SECURE ELECTIONS](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9748210/224717773/200950/2/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=034392f3)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials  thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9748210/224717773/188340/8/).

* _The highest gas prices we've seen in years, along with shortages in multiple states._

name: M. Lopez
subject: a personal request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
Friend, I have some concerning news: We're still eight responses short of what we need to fight back against the Arizona GOP's sham election audit. Before it's too late: Will you join me now in condemning Republican attempts to overturn the 2020 election?

https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk86-su-text

Not only are extremist Republicans like Kelli Ward trying to steal the election from President Biden – but they've also hired QAnon-supporting conspiracy theorists to "recount" millions of ballots.
I mean, friend – we just heard their "big strategy" is to look for bamboo in the ballot papers, all because they heard a conspiracy theory that China tried to rig our election for Joe Biden. It's completely ridiculous – but if we don't speak up and call this audit the sham that it is, then the GOP may succeed in casting doubt on President Biden's victory.
That's why I need to hear from you so urgently. Please, we only have a few hours left before we close this poll, so speak out right now:

Will you condemn the Arizona GOP's sham "election audit" and defend our democracy against these baseless, outrageous attacks?

YES https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk86-su-text
NO https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk86-su-text

Thank you,
Marco
---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Rachel Maddow Updates (via Team Lopez)
Date: Thu, May 20, 2021
Subject: re: Maddow's urgent warning

RACHEL MADDOW'S WARNING FOR DEMOCRATS:
ARIZONA GOP'S SHAM ELECTION AUDIT COULD LEAD TO THE "END OF DEMOCRACY"

SPEAK OUT NOW: WILL YOU CONDEMN THE ARIZONA GOP'S SHAM "ELECTION AUDIT" AND DEFEND OUR DEMOCRACY?
YES https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk86-su-text
NO https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk86-su-text

Friend, this may be the most outrageous attack on our democracy yet.

Extremists in the Arizona GOP – led by Kelli Ward – are currently recounting millions of ballots in a sham "election audit" – all to overturn President Joe Biden's historic victory in Arizona!

Even worse? They've hired a QAnon-supporting, conspiracy theorist group to conduct the recount in secret . Let's be clear: They're not trying to make our elections more secure. They're still trying to push Trump's Big Lie, steal the election from President Biden and rig the system so Democrats can never win in Arizona again. ---
Team \--
I’ve always been a strong advocate for preserving Nevada’s natural beauty. I hold Lake Tahoe very close to my heart as it’s where my family and I have made so many memories together.
As one of the lakes with the purest water _in the world_ , Lake Tahoe is an economic cornerstone for Nevada because of the thousands of tourists it attracts per year. This is why I’m proud to join my colleagues in support of the extended authorization of the **Lake Tahoe Restoration Act.**
[_**Will you join me and sign your name in support of the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29588034/286879529/1333787100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzVjNmM1Yi0yM2JiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Ksx6DgtCgfZ_-NSbkcLJc5DHtoV877QyDLqfYMGM2Y=&emci=feab13c4-fcb7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=135c6c5b-23bb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)
| | [Sign on: Preserve Lake Tahoe →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29588037/286879530/1333787100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzVjNmM1Yi0yM2JiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Ksx6DgtCgfZ_-NSbkcLJc5DHtoV877QyDLqfYMGM2Y=&emci=feab13c4-fcb7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=135c6c5b-23bb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)
---
From preventing fires and erosion to protecting endangered and native species, the benefits of extending the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act are plentiful. This bipartisan legislation provides federal funding that goes a long way in _maintaining Lake Tahoe for generations to come._
I want our children and grandchildren to inherit our public lands in even better shape than we did. (_After all, two-thirds of Nevada is made up of public lands!_) So, I need your help in making sure that’s possible.
[_**Can we count on you to sign our petition in support of extending the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29588039/286879531/1333787100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzVjNmM1Yi0yM2JiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Ksx6DgtCgfZ_-NSbkcLJc5DHtoV877QyDLqfYMGM2Y=&emci=feab13c4-fcb7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=135c6c5b-23bb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)
| | [Sign on: Preserve Lake Tahoe →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29588042/286879532/1333787100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzVjNmM1Yi0yM2JiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Ksx6DgtCgfZ_-NSbkcLJc5DHtoV877QyDLqfYMGM2Y=&emci=feab13c4-fcb7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=135c6c5b-23bb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)
---
If we stand together, I know we can keep Nevada’s lands beautiful.
With gratitude,
Susie Lee

body:
I need you to know: Everything just changed in the race for the House. >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210522_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30&amount=15

-- Trump vowed to run for President if Republicans flip the House
-- He has $250 MILLION in the bank to help them succeed
-- And sources just revealed Trump could be DAYS from his first rally

I cannot overstate the importance. The ONLY thing standing in the way of another Trump Presidency is Democrats’ ability to HOLD the House. Which is why I just set an ambitious goal to raise $250,000 by midnight to ECLIPSE Trump’s return with a MASSIVE Democratic fundraising surge to defeat him. It is absolutely critical we reach our goal and make Trump’s first rally BACKFIRE. Can I count on your $15? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210522_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30&amount=15

I’ll be honest: Our Majorities are razor-thin.

A mere handful of seats could cost us the House and launch Trump’s Presidential run.

Which is why I need you to step up in this moment more than ever before.

Because if I don’t reach my goal, Trump and Republicans will take it as a sign that our Majority is theirs for the taking.

I refuse to let that happen. I will not allow this dangerous, one-term President to rally his base, steal our Majority, and barge back into power. So I’m asking. Will you rush $15 to make Trump’s first rally BACKFIRE? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210522_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30&amount=15

name: Battleground State Alert via Senate GOP
subject: Dark Money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
On the campaign trail, Biden touted his commitment to following the science.

Friend,

On the campaign trail, Biden touted his commitment to following the science. However, now in office, it seems he is more committed to bowing down to a critical voting block of his than working for the betterment of America.

Just recently, it was reported that the American Federation of Teachers, the top teachers union, lobbied the CDC for specific guidelines -- all at the expense of our children's education and our Country's future. And worst of all, dark money groups were heavily involved.

If there is one thing we know for sure, Friend, dark money groups play to win no matter who is in their way. [**And their next mission? Turning the state of Wisconsin blue.**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iL9HN_UADvJrr7geHlYRthqzQMISDFF99a8ATSwVmaR5usfd-oW2vjUFZ5Ipic8Nj5zwaJVHKJc8kUbBhnqIOyPPWiS6ckoYIpesOQxvGHVfojiiYPRS7eCGvPNaxArMPQXWfvHBNB1efs4EDZYeDyXtYkM3yYq-hypaqxpou5Lv1mdQ1gBFJBhk-U9ciffYJ42lFfOb84ZIJ3tCvaTuFsvFGItnma1PUhC8xUTVCAuvZNxuTtJrgGU6Nva_DuPXQoO4_Y6kNmtKi8HWGlVDY52ZNnbUX3SWZxvGhA4uCqxFJcz8y3Ip7NPLnnwSkGghtE5stGhO0QcjaC3HNwYZGS82IVuQzromstL4K_UqOsr2sSKOiC1yeef9zfGzLaZH3_d_s7Ec62dMeE9SNd6krfHq9mDn1t_0G-M2jkAarKY=&c=h_DuzEF8_OlrMPKoDmRjfVysNZ_ucWiPG_qOGfrhE2jGTmQ2DveFOQ==&ch=aAWFrOLYwlaK1H1RSfFK6mFFdBYhjSCM6efFhkl2qR8nSwEVgNotjg==)

Millions of dollars in dark money are flooded across states every election cycle to push the far-Left agenda. These groups are full of highly experienced political operatives that want to force states to adopt progressive ideas such as higher taxes, fewer jobs, and free everything.

These same dark money groups will be locking in on Wisconsin in the coming months because they suspect that this state is a battleground state. They suspect they can walk right in and flip it blue. But we CANNOT allow that, Friend.

We need YOUR help to defeat the Left's dark money groups, and we need to start right now.
