body:
This week's updates from Joe Kent (Candidate for WA-03) | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
####
# **Joe Kent
Highlights 16-22 May 2021**
---
| _This was an exciting week. My incredible volunteers were amazing at the 14-16 May Gun Shows! I had the opportunity to be on the Save America Server (Est. 2017) for an" Ask Me Anything "(the original owners of "The Donald" discord server), Andrew after Dark, Unstructured Podcast and Jason Rantz on KTTH. I was honored that the Bull Moose Project endorsed me and I'm honored to have received support from Peter Thiel. __ I thoroughly enjoyed having a chance to meet everyone who was at the Clark County Republican Women's event and answer your questions! Thanks for your support! _\- Joe

**Upcoming Events & Media:
Monday, 31 May - Co-hosting Steve Bannon's War Room
Thursday, 3 Jun 6pm-8pm- Lewis County Meet & Greet, **Pathway Church of God** ** 1416 S Scheuber Rd #9018, Centralia, WA 98531
**Saturday, 26 June, Fundraiser, **Click link for details and tickets **[26 June Event Tickets](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=9eddb58d3b&e=00856e661d)
Sunday, 27 June, Fundraiser, **Click link for details and tickets** [27 June Event Tickets](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=3a606af913&e=00856e661d)

This Week's Events/Clips:
Monday, 17 May - **Ask Me Anything, Save America Discord [Economics and National Security](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=16ca9a70cf&e=00856e661d), [Dept of Education](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=af2bef1c79&e=00856e661d) , [Antifa Riots and COVID](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=f54213e8ad&e=00856e661d)
**Tuesday, 18 May -** Men's Breakfast [Election Integrity](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=062d23923c&e=00856e661d), [Military Purge](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=198ccf060c&e=00856e661d) , [H-1B1 Program -Twitter](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=364415eab7&e=00856e661d)
**Thursday, 20 May -**[January 6th Commission - YouTube ](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=d8abe2eb64&e=00856e661d)(long), [January 6th Commission - Twitter](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=9a90a4e858&e=00856e661d) (short)
**Friday, 21 May -** Clark County Republican Women Event- Great turnout![**Watch and share the video of Joe speaking/answering questions here!**](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=facd495b23&e=00856e661d) Pictures from event: [pic1](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=096f82dc63&e=00856e661d) , [pic2](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=e739e946d7&e=00856e661d) , [pic3](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=e038bd7813&e=00856e661d) ,[pic4](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=232d9b4db3&e=00856e661d)

**Volunteer Updates:**
BIG Thank you to all the volunteers who showed up to support 14May-16May at the gun shows over the last weekend! See their smiling faces here: [Group Photo](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=f1ab3c111e&e=00856e661d)
**Want to Volunteer? Sign up[here](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=37a412d841&e=00856e661d)!

Media
17 May - **"Joe Kent -** ** Ask Me Anything" on the Save America Discord Server, Listen to the entire AMA here: [Joe Kent Full Q And A 1 – YouTube](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=34dba435fc&e=00856e661d) (full AMA),
**18 May - Joe Kent** supporter, Denny Anderson, writes letter to the editor in The Reflector: [Letter to the editor: Dump Jaime and hire Joe Kent | The Reflector](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=b74c3ddb53&e=00856e661d)
**19 May -** Andrew After Dark - America Out Loud Podcast Network, Listen here: [The Next Battlefield for Joe Kent is Congress – America Out Loud](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=3811c14bc8&e=00856e661d)
**20 May -** Eric Hunley, Unstructured Podcast, Listen here: [Eric Hunley Unstructured – Joe Kent a Green Beret for Congress – YouTube](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=9ad9fe1401&e=00856e661d)
**21 May** \- The Jason Rantz Show on KTTH Radio: Jason and Joe discuss vaccines, January 6th Commission, and Israel. The interview begins at 11:24. Click here to listen: [Joe Kent on The Jason Rantz Show (mynorthwest.com)](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=b7239ff966&e=00856e661d)
21 May -[ Livestream of Joe Kent at Clark County Republican Women event](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=9a52a326ca&e=00856e661d)

**PRESS RELEASES:

Press Release - Bull Moose Project Endorses Joe Kent, 18 May 2021: **Today, the Bull Moose Project endorsed Joe Kent for Congress in Washington’s Third Congressional District. | [Click Here to view PDF of The Bull Moose Project's Endorsement](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=d9f92f4316&e=00856e661d)

---

* * *

**Press Release - Joe Kent Announces Opposition to Vaccinating Children without Parental Consent, 19 May 2021: **Parental authority is sacred and must not be pushed aside to inject experimental COVID vaccines into a child behind a parent’s back. The decision of whether to vaccinate a minor must lie entirely with the child’s parents. [Click Here to view PDF of Joe Kent's Statement on 19May2021](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=21a89df204&e=00856e661d)

name: Gabbi Chwae
subject: I want to talk with you about Tom Nelson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| |
May is Asian Heritage Month and I'm a proud Asian-American born and raised in Wisconsin. In a time of rising hate crimes against Asian Americans, it’s important to note our community exists here and honor their contributions.

Tom and my father grew up miles away from each other. Tom's grandpa and my dad's father were both patent inventors in Milwaukee. Both have laid down roots in Wisconsin and call the Badger state home.

But, contrary to Tom, my father's family came to America only decades ago. As Korean immigrants, my dad's family settled in small town Wisconsin, eventually spending a good chunk of time in Appleton. They left a war-torn Korea in search of the "American Dream." (I laugh at my family for their strange choice to have landed in Wisconsin. Maybe they threw a dart at a map?) As you'd expect, they were the only Asian family for miles around, and they faced adversity and racism like any immigrant family must battle.

As kids, my sister and I faced adversity, both in subtle comments on our strange last name to outright bullying. This, among many things, politicized me. We faced hardship as immigrants and as a biracial family, but we also built our lives in Wisconsin and found and built a community in this state.

Wisconsin was our home, but I soon realized that our elected officials weren't protecting our families. Politicians like Scott Walker, Paul Ryan, and Ron Johnson were holding my state hostage to right-wing and corporate interests that harmed families like mine. Since then, I knew I wanted to work in politics and to fight for the people of Wisconsin, the people like my family. My superpower is my foot in both worlds - where half of my family is 4th, 5th, or 6th generation Wisconsinite and the other half, a Wisconsin-Korean immigrant family. From this, I've realized that the best solutions for families like mine are those rooted in progressive mores.

So, when it comes to finding a Senator who can finally replace Ron Johnson, I completely support Tom Nelson. He's the candidate who will fight for policies that will improve Wisconsinites' lives, like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and social, racial, and economic justice. I trust Tom because I know he'll fight for families like mine. I'm proud of my family for contributing to the beauty and diversity of Wisconsin and know we deserve better representation than Ron Johnson.

Gabbi Chwae

We need to send conservative fighters to Washington who have the courage to rein in the radical Left. As a Navy SEAL, I’m prepared for that battle to take on the Left and make America safe again. The same Democrats who want to abolish the police and prisons also want to disarm you by shredding the Second Amendment and leave our borders completely unsecured. It’s time to take back the reins of our country. But unfortunately, there are too many Republican politicians who lack the backbone to stand up to the Left as they endanger America. As President Trump has said, it’s simply not enough for Republicans to win in 2022 -- we need conservative, pro-Trump FIGHTERS to win big at the ballot box next year. That’s why I’m counting on your support as we fight to win this open Senate seat in Missouri. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Crenshaw?=
subject: Know what drives liberals crazy?
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | |
Peter-

Dan Crenshaw here.

This week, I went head-to-head with Chuck Todd on Meet the Press to explain why Americans have bigger things to worry about (thanks to Joe Biden) than D.C. drama that doesn’t affect their lives. I also called on Americans to stay focused on the issues that matter, and not get distracted by the liberal media’s propaganda and spin.

Follow me on [Twitter](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=81528c6ec5&e=56fbdb3cc4), [Facebook](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=520a60d040&e=56fbdb3cc4), and [Instagram](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=fd7a970a98&e=56fbdb3cc4) for regular updates and news you can use. Text **CRENSHAW** to **49500** to get text message updates directly from me.

Now, here’s your campaign brief.
---
| | **HERE'S WHAT AMERICANS REALLY CARE ABOUT (AND IT'S NOT DC INFIGHTING)**

[](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=223f9f7ab0&e=56fbdb3cc4) [**CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH**](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=0b5a2ed350&e=56fbdb3cc4)
Gas shortages. Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants flooding across our borders. Rising unemployment, inflation, and violent crime in our communities. The American people are facing serious problems thanks to Joe Biden’s policies.

But notice that the liberal media refuses to cover this, including widely-watched shows like Meet the Press. Rather than focus on the issues that matter to people, Meet the Press invited me on the show to talk about D.C. drama that doesn’t affect real Americans including my constituents.

Here’s what Chuck Todd didn’t expect, though:**I don’t take the bait from the press. **

I explained to Chuck that Americans - my constituents - couldn’t care less about the BS political drama he focused on throughout the majority of his show. **They care about rising gas prices. They care about getting their kids back to school. They care about rising unemployment. They care about a secure country.**

But the press won’t cover this. **They want to ignore it because they want to protect Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi.**

I’m going to continue to highlight the real problems these socialists have created for Americans, even if the press won’t. But I need your help for this message to reach a bigger audience than the liberal press has access to.

**Will you help?** [**A contribution of $5, $15, $35, $50, or any amount you can afford to chip-in will make a difference.**](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=e5048451cf&e=56fbdb3cc4)
---
| [ ](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=2dea2365cb&e=56fbdb3cc4)
---
| | **KNOW WHAT DRIVES LIBERALS CRAZY?**

[](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=5a28a0ccdd&e=56fbdb3cc4) [**CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH**](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=0c4b27ca6a&e=56fbdb3cc4)
It always happens when I go on these shows: **I drive liberals crazy!** The Washington Post devoted THREE analyses to my interview, spinning and propagandizing about how I am ignoring the “real problem” that they are obsessed with: D.C. drama.

They don’t like it when somebody who is reasonable, who has a different point of view but can also reason their way through that point of view, comes on their shows and pokes holes in that liberal bubble because they like to propagandize. **They don’t like facts. **

Here’s what the liberal media doesn’t understand about their narrative:**nobody cares about insider DC politics. **

My constituents are not affected by that, **and I’m not going to try to make the case that this is what we should be focused on.**

Let’s actually debate issues. I will always come on these shows and debate toe to toe on any issue — even the tough ones. Let’s debate environmental policy, health care, the border, taxation, whatever they want to debate.

**But they don’t do it.** They don’t like that, because they know that covering these issues will mean they have to focus on the REAL PROBLEMS Democrats are creating for our country.
So, instead, they want to just talk gossip and keep ignoring the socialist agenda we are experiencing right before our eyes.

**I’m not going to let it happen.**
---
| | **ON SOCIAL MEDIA**

[](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=994d9065d0&e=56fbdb3cc4)

[](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=7c161f86b7&e=56fbdb3cc4)

[](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=a529711ab9&e=56fbdb3cc4)

[](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=dafc5fec83&e=56fbdb3cc4)

---
| | **RECOMMENDED READS**
**DAILY WIRE:** [‘The Press Is Largely Liberal’: Dan Crenshaw Calls Out Media Bias In Contentious Interview On NBC](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=8dcf15b34e&e=56fbdb3cc4)

**THE BLAZE:** [Dan Crenshaw schools Liz Warren on taxes: 'Use all the data Senator'](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=17dbac4edb&e=56fbdb3cc4)

**FOX NEWS:** [Dan Crenshaw clashes with NBC's Chuck Todd on GOP drama: I'm not going to 'take the bait' from 'liberal' press](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=b9c8607ae6&e=56fbdb3cc4)

Thanks for your support.
In service,

Dan Crenshaw

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I went head-to-head with Chuck Todd on Meet the Press to explain why Americans have bigger things to worry about (thanks to Joe Biden) than D.C. drama that doesn’t affect their lives. I also called on Americans to stay focused on the issues that matter, and not get distracted by the liberal media’s propaganda and spin. Follow me on , , and for regular updates and news you can use. Text CRENSHAW to 49500 to get text message updates directly from me. Now, here’s your campaign brief. | | HERE'S WHAT AMERICANS REALLY CARE ABOUT (AND IT'S NOT DC INFIGHTING) Gas shortages. Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants flooding across our borders. Rising unemployment, inflation, and violent crime in our communities. The American people are facing serious problems thanks to Joe Biden’s policies. But notice that the liberal media refuses to cover this, including widely-watched shows like Meet the Press. Rather than focus on the issues that matter to people, Meet the Press invited me on the show to talk about D.C. drama that doesn’t affect real Americans including my constituents. Here’s what Chuck Todd didn’t expect, though:I don’t take the bait from the press. I explained to Chuck that Americans - my constituents - couldn’t care less about the BS political drama he focused on throughout the majority of his show. They care about rising gas prices. They care about getting their kids back to school. They care about rising unemployment. They care about a secure country. But the press won’t cover this. They want to ignore it because they want to protect Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi. I’m going to continue to highlight the real problems these socialists have created for Americans, even if the press won’t. But I need your help for this message to reach a bigger audience than the liberal press has access to. Will you help? | | | KNOW WHAT DRIVES LIBERALS CRAZY? It always happens when I go on these shows: I drive liberals crazy! The Washington Post devoted THREE analyses to my interview, spinning and propagandizing about how I am ignoring the “real problem” that they are obsessed with: D.C. drama. They don’t like it when somebody who is reasonable, who has a different point of view but can also reason their way through that point of view, comes on their shows and pokes holes in that liberal bubble because they like to propagandize. They don’t like facts. Here’s what the liberal media doesn’t understand about their narrative:nobody cares about insider DC politics. My constituents are not affected by that, and I’m not going to try to make the case that this is what we should be focused on. Let’s actually debate issues. I will always come on these shows and debate toe to toe on any issue — even the tough ones. Let’s debate environmental policy, health care, the border, taxation, whatever they want to debate. But they don’t do it. They don’t like that, because they know that covering these issues will mean they have to focus on the REAL PROBLEMS Democrats are creating for our country. So, instead, they want to just talk gossip and keep ignoring the socialist agenda we are experiencing right before our eyes. I’m not going to let it happen. | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | RECOMMENDED READS DAILY WIRE: THE BLAZE: FOX NEWS: Thanks for your support. In service, Dan Crenshaw | | "TARA CRENSHAW ON THE BUDDY PUSH" | | By providing your phone number, you agree to the terms & privacy policy (ckq.io/49500) for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Team Crenshaw to the phone number you provide. name: Sharice Davids
subject: I support Jennifer Carroll Foy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | | If there’s one thing our country needs right now, it’s smart, powerful women in leadership who are ready to break barriers, deliver for their constituents, and inspire others to serve their communities.

I’m confident that Jennifer Carroll Foy is the perfect candidate for Virginia governor. I’m proud to endorse her and hope she can count on your support.

**[There’s less than 3 weeks until her primary so there’s no time to waste. Donate now to power her campaign in the final stretch.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-W3SZeu5iBYI_IFTfG_HVNM_ZnXwgTTG7hl248H1Ikok2AzLfkehNnkS9bomjUhEFfhm5qpoK1XzBbhpGW5M21c7gc0ZggqFCAHagf3nmJDYix-z_fIeVDI4PvFTSawHzBsRdIYnyqGcv3Bw3oHtBPhrJrqjPzFODgXABByRJ44jl67K1ktdzddHiyvBY-g8ZOKaXMaxVwwj72-Ovn7qFtioUxmFqyPxmLuw2UZtEUfApl7J1RuBky2bdQEq2Qk2C2vQvwPnifuOaKrE_qSNWjYuN6IJcIqlDV6jkTjVwZSCILPF6cnZ2oqyoHezK6Mly7Yfo-xd_NNXbLt52zcNl1A/3c4/KfhLAWSeTtm6jiJWj-Yjpg/h0/71zdJHqsNUkZuLcbE_vdW18qzaay5kScY46t2psLAtc)**

Throughout her life, Jennifer’s community inspired her to capture her potential and blaze her own path — one that led her to become one of the first women to graduate from the Virginia Military Institute and serve in the House of Delegates just after giving birth to twins.

In her public service career, Jennifer has focused on a pro-woman, pro-labor, and pro-environment agenda. After leading the charge in the Virginia House of Delegates to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, she knew she had to keep fighting for everyday Virginians, just like those who lifted her up years ago.

**It’s time to elect America’s first Black woman governor, and Jennifer is poised to bring historic progress to Virginians.**

**[Do you agree? Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-W3SZeu5iBYI_IFTfG_HVNM_ZnXwgTTG7hl248H1IkomBB2ZKW_dGTyFajpPXe4JhApaQftI0iZq9pwuIUBdusaOnyJjhpaaH3mqVwhxF0EGsLL1GrolyT1WO3Lwr3HslH7ss32mcsThWG9b7bcPtGzLJOo2xWB_yosBffXfszFs9rVFAUvWnJao-EPl2NPZKO33sO-gEpojYQym4S12ZgUXFe8yFpX3QOYNWt5Xza7Mkoh74W5I7HHAN9OuBJ8WH7iSlN6_wb8bOPZQVfmidyyAwr3vWlGiVR_VV8-bx0_C8PESynd7qWvq39sL-hdTtZ-ebeuUTPszq8sGf5oD5BQ/3c4/KfhLAWSeTtm6jiJWj-Yjpg/h1/me-7n7Y6ANtea9lwjU7hVlg-Y8C04NjwoKqFKHa3tzo)**

Thank you,

Sharice Davids

_United States Representative, Kansas 3rd District_

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_Bh73lWki93nG0RUyySk6zkTRBWLykLOh_ikrEg1x5MOaRlgWjCaUYoRLLmuz-K3w7SDDcaD7UEBW2R9MKbZiew5hQffeCvVouZzdnJCgmSpKaA-6NvYdMLdDUH3m0pGGh6liSZWrUTW1UomAgHRmVIdh5iGBTRexxMYCSpR4TbifJ9w8NC6ZvL4IXIj5_V2Y1j38haSq07M2K6jlcYNSkE7PkDaiP56DZYUsK2Bg6g2RLiAduG1rQDTVhEK_UH3Bne8eEld9mi4pj6W9AVjeZOBp3676IAviCGqE_2n58Xg/3c4/KfhLAWSeTtm6jiJWj-Yjpg/h2/yp4wmJifs87Z5eF_6EZ4markNCtiwrLVP1-xJTKUN_o)**_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_pXkWAZF1xX_YPR-e_nM-xsMzwmhzFMlK0z2hbrgzKa2UCMmh05C5nRRJOwH2YtRYziE2Ik8REYsZx0udc2V3If7dNQw6VwSh3xeivqpeNkRq7DzIo_-SvlbzlLIoqBMBTWj2bdI2JUYIX2OvKbURtmKxLwV0epMv-NYnwr1wXB_W_Cd8AhpPUAeCywFsfqA4nfyqA2wMniIQFcav1zl5qpBpBu7TESWYyT1WMUBSubh5ExV9AQcr8tCaXqU8EeMMEkCbsaNKiB0AdMPyE5qIGY_3W99JCAqg8VFpnZN-j9g/3c4/KfhLAWSeTtm6jiJWj-Yjpg/h3/P-XeyzhI6TGs5eDQb4z9c96MNzHbJMXYf9rVfVs0En0) | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor

name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: Only a few hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
Last chance to help this critical need!
Peter, I know we only have a few hours to go... but we are getting close to hitting our goal! My finance director just called me and let me know that we only need to raise $2,050 more before midnight tonight. If you haven’t chipped in yet, can you rush a secure online donation right now? Just follow this link to donate online from your phone, computer, or tablet: **[https://secure.anedot.com/faulconer-for-governor-2021/donate-may](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d2090064cdf3e78a/b38650b50ee731a7c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** Californians are in major need of a tax break. Did you know that the middle class in California pays the same amount in incomes taxes as millionaires in New York? That’s insane! Please donate now, whether it is $5, $50, or $500. Every single dollar matters, and we need everyone to pitch in what they can before our deadline tonight. Thanks so much,
Kevin | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d2090064cdf3e78a/07bcb699cbb687cac3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d2090064cdf3e78a/15df93bc0ba64be4c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d2090064cdf3e78a/e2a9ed7d17cf3f72c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d2090064cdf3e78a/3ea7fbdbcc0ebf02c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

clean_body: Last chance to help this critical need! Peter, I know we only have a few hours to go... but we are getting close to hitting our goal! My finance director just called me and let me know that we only need to raise $2,050 more before midnight tonight. If you haven’t chipped in yet, can you rush a secure online donation right now? Just follow this link to donate online from your phone, computer, or tablet: Californians are in major need of a tax break. Did you know that the middle class in California pays the same amount in incomes taxes as millionaires in New York? That’s insane! Please donate now, whether it is $5, $50, or $500. Every single dollar matters, and we need everyone to pitch in what they can before our deadline tonight. Thanks so much, Kevin | | | | | ---|---|---|--- id:2021-05-12-15:14:06:719t Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021

Friend,

Israel is one of America’s greatest allies and friends, and right now they are under attack.

I’ve been working hard to help Israel and bring peace and stability to the region, and right now they need us more than ever. We have to fight back and **[STAND UP FOR ISRAEL](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=e31cfd8cd32d4e0ea9cc612b4d135162&_e=F0Tm_2Zok3kv-N9eEK1DuPHnykFrcug3Id4XEYtA04YBPRfALbraCV488KOs9DuXMbSEgZvWsDrwR6UygjfsMSaZ9CzHq75QSCha84rGNwPVqat3ArXfnkxr4GKogDWwvpNGWq8AkdLXAE15bffkVxKV8vdBIsg3D24TNAfLeCRdhktoENfWPPCi6_tjRXBZUm87hJ-sv3Y4mgpuse4eu-OO7Lyt5-G0AMwFN5HMqH6_NR9i1DeCFqOGFzov9WhTtQVIT3N8m9eSkJpNwEjjrL2r16LQjUDNBi1WstMf-bKU-fUYHV7lLUOppdRjQagEFXbZmEJYnsEyzigtyxM0MS1TnkzC4AUwxZ7WROmlf0AlQyY-DoB6a8aONohLAZaHpUZXB_hmb6uOUMn52L56gxwk9ul7KFcO7eJPgmzm3x3tq3EGmydC76p9kzNLbQsmUw9qH1kJNMJjlNMiTfnYvhGy_6yMIpzzO7g_LR8zuRk%3D)** especially with AOC and the pro-Hamas Squad gaining power in the Democratic caucus.

Instead of taking action to support our friends in Israel, the Biden administration remains laser-focused on enacting their radical, liberal agenda. I can’t sit back and let this happen anymore. [**Will you join me in standing with Israel TODAY?**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=e31cfd8cd32d4e0ea9cc612b4d135162&_e=F0Tm_2Zok3kv-N9eEK1DuPHnykFrcug3Id4XEYtA04YBPRfALbraCV488KOs9DuXMbSEgZvWsDrwR6UygjfsMSaZ9CzHq75QSCha84rGNwPVqat3ArXfnkxr4GKogDWwvpNGWq8AkdLXAE15bffkVxKV8vdBIsg3D24TNAfLeCRdhktoENfWPPCi6_tjRXBZUm87hJ-sv3Y4mgpuse4eu-OO7Lyt5-G0AMwFN5HMqH6_NR9i1DeCFqOGFzov9WhTtQVIT3N8m9eSkJpNwEjjrB3kv1njk30QxeNqUkxVpyAgm1qOepFWCf-nLghczq_yR8YoSXzeHh2ozOC0ANCslCbHZB54Taya12VguZNmIzQW2CbuwqrMcMDorHYELZHGlA-u9BEcUYlhZP1vSoqlziwYW3ZemL8yeoidGE61DYr-U8Pl1C5omOPay1cC7LD5cn-k-t8_C3ZOzmsmd4uE9-hi2LxoGsoUdBpLq0iW70g%3D)

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: We need to act on gun violence. [SURVEY]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
But Glenn Youngkin wants more weapons of war on our streets.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29591581/286891150/-2023814932?refcode=20210522_TM_5BH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzRhZjgxNy0zMmJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=trVCWYqXg82Vg0vSsHsMxrsX00aG5X86cPkf_daUk14=)

| | Derek,

Let’s face the facts: gun violence is a public health crisis in the United States.

But the Republican nominee, Glenn Youngkin, doesn’t agree.

He’s been endorsed by AR-15-toting former candidate Amanda Chase. He’s bragged about being a lifetime member of the NRA. And he’s already promised not to sign _any_ legislation enacting commonsense gun violence prevention measures if elected.

**We know Glenn Youngkin won’t take this crisis seriously -- and we can’t stand for that.[Are you with me? Take my survey and let me know if you agree that we need to treat gun safety as a top priority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29591584/286891151/1689100111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzRhZjgxNy0zMmJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=trVCWYqXg82Vg0vSsHsMxrsX00aG5X86cPkf_daUk14=&emci=b4edd24e-7bba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ac4af817-32bb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7540477)**

**Derek, this is about saving lives.** I promise that I won’t stop fighting until we’ve removed weapons of war from the streets of our Commonwealth and banned the sale of assault weapons in Virginia.

The NRA is already running attack ads against me because they know I’m serious, and they know that Glenn Youngkin will always back their dangerous, deadly agenda.

**[Let me know what you think and fill out my survey today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29591586/286891152/1689100111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzRhZjgxNy0zMmJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=trVCWYqXg82Vg0vSsHsMxrsX00aG5X86cPkf_daUk14=&emci=b4edd24e-7bba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ac4af817-32bb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7540477)**

\-- Terry | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29591588/286891153/-2023814932?refcode=20210522_TM_5BH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzRhZjgxNy0zMmJiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=trVCWYqXg82Vg0vSsHsMxrsX00aG5X86cPkf_daUk14=)

name: Jake Oakman
subject: Already paying dividends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb’s effort to create thousands of Hoosier jobs has never stopped and the results continue to be felt throughout the state in MAJOR ways | |
---
|
---
Friend,

Governor Holcomb’s effort to create thousands of Hoosier jobs has never stopped and the results continue to be felt throughout the state in MAJOR ways.

Just in the few weeks since the legislative session ended, multiple Fortune 500 companies have been eager to do business in Indiana –– and they’ve committed to create over **3,000** new jobs and invest more than **$900 million** into the Hoosier economy.

_I’ve included a few articles below that break down these developments._

[**[READ] Toyota Indiana announces $803 million investment bringing all-new electric SUVs and jobs**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=31d0ee4f7cd340668344198ef297a2f7&_e=SmsXy0fQjPoYVzuYjVx9ECnkYlmDgHaOy4Gbx-hxVDv1jhwemBzU6CoevyVK8eBgly062gSfejBdfyXnH5lI8jBsyVv2x78KNHVrr_oXnwq7Nqw4lHGvxEA_EO0xPqTcswocf_ydlrfSmDO4k_0KKXf968ExD7vtp2OU3hkmhzSX2catmU-CRuUTRW3-vWgISiDyVJJvQ9Gfcju_q6c0-3Pia-sfcDXYa_-QER7gJdjNAEdF_1sIqXCxvHDY2aSxl889bRzllwRh5CjqxlmyU2P5gSOCRY1evUj341a30mU4BGOX_uQGoqvtnkkFdXR_D4RAr43W-Th6hSSomckuDEz1G5yMa35Amxmqe9f1wWD37dzzR371YeXskqtVDM4fpO0hJUsZhvAuVyBywvEJuXpPww5fbekawzNtHBqu15s3vaQCokSWSakpUDWGsv_Q-8MNOSbFg0YE6y9VcsqHgLU7RN6dKCpb9WaFmTJJ5VPv-LcVISGzKeXN4_Y134RZZZEPRRvf-WXLr_08jT5XaUatFxLxZal8MuEF1mWPz-A%3D)
**The bottom line:**_“Indiana Governor Eric Holcomb was on hand as Toyota Indiana announced a major investment at the Princeton plant that will bring new jobs and new electric vehicles to the Tristate. 1,400 jobs are coming to Toyota Indiana as the company invests more than $800 million to expand production of new electric SUVs.”_ –– Tristate Homepage

[**[READ] Apple Announces $100 Million Investment In New Indiana Facility**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=31d0ee4f7cd340668344198ef297a2f7&_e=SmsXy0fQjPoYVzuYjVx9EJwCjk74LHbY3wV5LPRNUX9Bzi1rTFhs7Ynfv6-0lOS4AYiDuHF7eTdGynHy-Q9zxitbn2LqeB-e-vdZ0Ei2ES1cjp7QyhsfTFRtLJAO0QxtREloaENXZze2xMOA-Wjll-WaSPTHI6sfOzcesDTaco3Zc36tzKn-JjlpF4b6lWWsHSm0j03BGzHMYRsZLIMN8u9bWzQWIl6C_7mnGP4LcEAXyCmrAsXMiFmpbho5zqjqlNnIvdc1zJkFFMDiL9qyyvSekwlvEvBUr-w3sTyaFxC1fnLZZ7T7bf1QYHl0Agyt4Gpst5ZhK2oWWL9PjUUnn9sc3ugEDQ8sWVL6Mlnju_PvcwCIlxUyXAi7kpQQ1JchJ1WWBzM1fAHYNpBKhwAEZ169QvnD05bUB_ONyWiu_cPtsMsMh6ZFhOnEXlxz9nhgi6-HvqVufBkc97VbT4Z6lzvNKbwfZxigcwXjla9Zz2U3mcZLGjs3nojuWp7tkUwWnkeJeuJL_oWMeWRL7b3kxViklCIeXLP2UEl7uizEYLw%3D)
**The bottom line:**_“Apple plans to invest $100 million to build a new state-of-the-art distribution center in central Indiana as a part of its Advanced Manufacturing Fund. The announcement is part of the company’s expansion in multiple parts of the country totaling $430 billion. Gov. Eric Holcomb said in a statement that the state’s, “business-friendly ecosystem continues to bring innovative, cutting-edge companies like Apple to the Hoosier state.”_ –– WFYI Indianapolis

[**[READ] It’s official: Amazon confirms ‘Project Mastodon’ fulfillment center**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=31d0ee4f7cd340668344198ef297a2f7&_e=SmsXy0fQjPoYVzuYjVx9ECP2Ov34bMO7m9ZlR1kiOMkHaubdvI0PrW5ZNteFU84LmvGcCD5MsdoeQrTpES2ZBnJ3Ty4csCludjb_UEyKoGqHW0HY7eJBSZctgsmVi3qrzW417oCn3CdASRxqKSm3tZ6wGkrqWPZpv03IOhWFBrGhYd3CUra3Op8irJ9NWnos9Ed_DyO-ML_KOsHPxUiEf111sFGwZiPaFfoLHeSdU7ufVWBtLwVb48izSQaYCyIb9AzpJDuz-QJL4j_uhDuG3g-PJJ5eddagYahgkKnYuWzn7-1EOXpBk7rkMJXxrxIkdZRbKGcBSMSvvox9W-24ZWdtfW2S2RJ9gw_3II1kpHGWm950DLqvhcoveERoO9UcKe8hERwekYBBt1eG2YJe5xbbP0ZQjXchchljDHLyC8DP3SFHmYE9dX4cgxQCnfzCsOK_vhC1UZqhe2J81cT6oa8iRbw4VDIN9qDJEMePh2KCBqEIN-HDyT1j7E1XW_TzyBKUVDSIKx4Iv0mHWcScY7rmmXdeyLu6H5p16g4KJDOlw8PRCvQsPgD4rMZNyEzznWwmf09vZZyF0ozWWT3hxS0OeeNbCI0MfE2JwFEOuODY3TmusdYw8NCc8eToYEE-Xfj0bGP3MTBXOLozzgwYug%3D%3D)
**The bottom line:**_“Amazon is employing thousands of Hoosiers and expanding growth opportunities for the city of Fort Wayne,” said Interim Indiana Secretary of Commerce Jim Staton. “This is great news from a global company that continues to recognize Indiana as a top destination for job creation and investment. This facility will serve countless customers across the country, further cementing Indiana’s position as one of top states for doing business.”_
–– WANE 15 News

[**[READ] Milwaukee Tool opens new service hub in Greenwood****
**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=31d0ee4f7cd340668344198ef297a2f7&_e=SmsXy0fQjPoYVzuYjVx9ENnE766KDVgWz22ba8kxtD854VjXUKFXs-btWPtNN4SlOAW1_A-RAk_PbAr1sQAxyMwqn9vMXqAw5EKyjE3LDRNWg08fYE9SihtVREHqw5TL8J9KtiSphlHENFqnJzLEUnuddsFx5lMMl-yvKA-qckWAN4H8t2i39mqxwJ9mJqQ3nsWCpG18zu-cggVkEYSX7_6WPrxxYZK-VtK-e7ULOpHyMkXZtscbZ99gO1RZVbVPSJAfWNN4294pmuLcBbyAU4iogvjE243ybyiSgrbW_P6lgLKoV8D24JdRqIV8yKHcWa2ISGWMgg9mCvfEebhaWn4I9f8XQ9WSiJ_OX8g9gJ6WmIG2WK3NCvcY2mo9Udbt1z2Ih1NuFNi1UFUccIBWGZQMoaNk9miF610alNujbm92QjA_HIVOlykwUMjO-Up7LGzomxLKoihYRIkQhwVIOeu_ExjNqlRtyXI3qtwcQLyBYH_G2AMB5VygbQ2Oys8HDlnyyxlslL9oI7RXr60PCg%3D%3D)**The bottom line:** _“Milwaukee Tool invested nearly $7 million to lease a 150,000 square-foot building on South Tech Drive in Greenwood. The facility will be for tool repair and warehousing space. The company plans to bring 450 new jobs to the area by the end of 2025 and has already hired 120 employees. “We are already involved in working with the community to make sure we have a world-class work environment here and make sure that we are developing the most exceptional talent that we can,” said Shane Moll, president of Milwaukee Tool. Governor Holcomb pointed to this development as another indication of Indiana’s strong economic momentum._
–– CBS 4 Indianapolis

Thank you for your continued support, friend –– we’ll be in touch soon.

Jake Oakman

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: re: digital ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This puts us at a *huge* disadvantage.
#
Our campaign is focused on building a statewide, diverse coalition of working people to transform politics as we know it — and an important part of our strategy is reaching as many people as we can online. **But we’re facing a *BIG* challenge:**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1567?refcode=em20210522-110&t=1&akid=110%2E3698%2EK46BoR)
Right now, Twitter continues to refuse to verify the accounts of many primary challengers running for office in 2022, including Erica’s. **For a scrappy, non-establishment campaign like ours, this puts us at a *huge* disadvantage.**
Without the blue checkmark, we need to invest *even more* in running digital ads right now to spread Erica’s message, build our moral movement, and grow attention around our campaign for one of the most competitive seats in the country.
[**With this in mind, will you make your first donation to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate today to help us fund our digital ads program and reach as many folks as possible?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1567?refcode=em20210522-110&t=21&akid=110%2E3698%2EK46BoR)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1567?refcode=em20210522-110&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=110%2E3698%2EK46BoR)**
When you’re a non-establishment candidate — especially a Black woman like Erica — you’re already going up against systems, barriers, and roadblocks. This is just another one.
Campaigns like ours are often overlooked and outraised because the pundits and the party establishment bet against us.
[**But the stronger we build our movement, the more we can prove we have what it takes to win. So, if you can, will you make your first contribution right now to keep Erica competitive by reaching thousands of people online?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1567?refcode=em20210522-110&t=23&akid=110%2E3698%2EK46BoR)

Team Erica Smith

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

clean_body: This puts us at a huge disadvantage. Our campaign is focused on building a statewide, diverse coalition of working people to transform politics as we know it — and an important part of our strategy is reaching as many people as we can online. But we’re facing a BIG challenge: Right now, Twitter continues to refuse to verify the accounts of many primary challengers running for office in 2022, including Erica’s. For a scrappy, non-establishment campaign like ours, this puts us at a huge disadvantage. Without the blue checkmark, we need to invest even more in running digital ads right now to spread Erica’s message, build our moral movement, and grow attention around our campaign for one of the most competitive seats in the country. When you’re a non-establishment candidate — especially a Black woman like Erica — you’re already going up against systems, barriers, and roadblocks. This is just another one. Campaigns like ours are often overlooked and outraised because the pundits and the party establishment bet against us. For all of us, Team Erica Smith Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

clean_body: Peter -- Did you catch this important race update? Our first opponent has filed his paperwork to run against Kim in the midterm elections. Republicans only need to flip five seats to take back the House majority, and our opponent is looking to win Washington's 8th District to help them do it. We need the help of this grassroots team right away to ensure we protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022. "" \----------Begin Forwarded Message---------- From: WA-08 Election Alert Subject: BREAKING: A Republican challenger just entered the race Date: Wednesday, May 19, 2021 BREAKING: A GOP challenger just filed to run against Kim in WA-08 The race for Washington's 8th District is on, team. A Republican challenger just filed his candidacy to run against Kim in the midterm elections. He is the first opponent to enter the race. With Democrats holding a slim majority in the House, we can't afford to lose Kim's seat. We know national Republicans and dark money PACs are already targeting Kim -- and spending -- whatever it takes to win, so we need to be prepared to fight back right away. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" "" "" "" "" Thanks to the work of this grassroots team, we flipped Washington's 8th District blue for the first time ever in 2018 and kept it blue in 2020. But this is a true purple district and as a top target of national Republicans we have an uphill battle ahead of us. Kim doesn't accept a dime of corporate PAC money. If we're going to take on our new opponent and keep Kim in Congress fighting for us, we need this grassroots team's support right away. "" Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? "" Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible.

| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-W3SZeu5iBYI_IFTfG_HVNGDKyxYjTwPrAvnzRNnxDLrBqTWDTODl8-SHY5vAJRj9kCIkrbRpmjOTB9TsPJKxW97dyS0VEapb7iCuoX6nsxo4RuWJ_Z6i6vboiOIxW9QaatpL4H2JRfyl5ahIy-B4V_7C_49I9Ia8LOERw7bKtiRZKcw0D2TzmvAez2EKJ2QraprSCZd-xifQkjKhLu_tqvKEuQSF1cYB-XTb2tZ7fBPbkTJhvCjoRnbJnp4ZF6iag8LisWPcELxg_Ji7p06G9v91-Fwj6vFHkegS8PWtbhPKbLfHB3B45359dGfP_qzr-yXtasWaCDjaB5lyPnsCiMlO3-e35CB7G2IumQWTRw8/3c4/RJhcJc7lSHSq6tXg8j4Jig/h0/yGS2gSxq1IhVZMRcxfcSZAt4YpXtuBUhjxFFOveCOeo) Hi - I’m Christina and I’m the VP of communications at EMILY’s List. I wanted to take a moment to connect personally because we are so excited to support Jennifer Carroll Foy!

Jennifer understands the challenges that many Virginians are facing— juggling multiple jobs, struggling to afford medical bills, and reeling from the impacts of COVID-19.

**She understands because she has lived these experiences herself, and that helps make her the right candidate for this unique moment.[With less than three weeks until the primary, I’m asking you to join EMILY’s List and show your support for Jennifer with a contribution to her campaign today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-W3SZeu5iBYI_IFTfG_HVNGDKyxYjTwPrAvnzRNnxDLrBqTWDTODl8-SHY5vAJRj9hyV453LXKpyqaBCEQG5jCMjMlRMOMMuoBVfrT7c-xwLk4XMrL0Ve1pTOP5pDEyOpUZ6H3VumeXoYal6B-lWtYJ9IvcHfIGUUC5aFo8OKanhQxh75xKc5H8a0ZrSIH4xcqJ1PLbN9955Ryjq1L-gtCaDSaRXTNYH9DfYl-FX_1YN-62E4MOQdaMJzh4qbhcUsNZlWhkgY-WkNyAsaLgxQBc4awNU4eg5TIUP8F-lFE5134H7Tv7lAZfeEw-ul9P3sVRVl4S--m_DpS5YAcmkI2iAz_YzrcKVbVKXYuxpe4jg/3c4/RJhcJc7lSHSq6tXg8j4Jig/h1/7EH0o4FoSwldMcLW3XckIf6zgByuAQbW7-QRwTDzD3E)**

Throughout Jennifer’s career, she has been a tireless advocate for Virginia’s working families, fighting for racial and economic equity, increased access to health care, and criminal justice reform.

**It is long past time to elect a Black woman governor who will dedicate herself to bettering the lives of Virginia’s working families and communities of color, as we know Jennifer will.**

**Polling shows that with the right resources, Jennifer can and will win.[This can only happen if supporters like you chip in and power her campaign to victory. There’s no time to waste. Donate now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-W3SZeu5iBYI_IFTfG_HVNGDKyxYjTwPrAvnzRNnxDLrBqTWDTODl8-SHY5vAJRj9NFOBQCvJ6YB7ZhHciMK_6lNCm6VXsYsE9AC1tXkFgs3IFEBXqNLCazO0yWWDmtKwFA45mIBDLBm9A3ar1P90KNAQmiU0IiN_0sTRav90onZG-6tXWuo2XVBZskKf6ttEgYEDQEIkcEP3oP_t46k1IW1e7qjM1uKdPuBD5_BMUMvR2RuaM_JMbEDHyVt6QJgtue1ipRGShu9JbwOgyJCIZcZz7oFbm2DbYptnNmTA9iF6S-M5BfsirgPw1n_eSFzD84i2i7EQNTBl3hX77F65Fphce2JVxmzrvHfOQKfr_TQ/3c4/RJhcJc7lSHSq6tXg8j4Jig/h2/uFG0mDIFxAAtmlcufUFVLvgw67opARiV77P5x3IT09Y)**

Thanks for supporting Jennifer. Let’s go win!

Christina

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_pXkWAZF1xX_YPR-e_nM-xsMzwmhzFMlK0z2hbrgzKa8uCtgRXjtCdMTS0xmQRz8QvUhPjnJdMUEHHdUG9F8MQZ3GYtQ7ufRWO483aVmhyO2n_AXyQlhQjWDwFSTW8TlDuuGTAwol0S3XW99oY25rsNLNXfUQn7NOG0KUitv91sDr8UgPPbobL2cyQl5gZ6JjIqNomu1fQG-LN9k8biTdbodRZKZAmIikDheRP3ri-fE7lXcgjQ3M0R9dVWFbvGqG_AD1xXI5zSr6Co-AXp54MsRN3_ABOtLk6IiStWRa-Hg/3c4/RJhcJc7lSHSq6tXg8j4Jig/h3/tzURqICjfaYxiP0yFbfeRBTFOAfQG33YEbpM7YQF7dM)**_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN58z3vFAlzvu3ErLyPr3cygUlT-3Ifr10lF2T604GzenKXHtRsPvc8R1J1OjsiH-52XkyIYPKFphZD8lNeGoQ7_u-2ceBVL-NlHMZVEjyzbsmVY_LiYloej8wUBot6wFCt0Sv4RlNgNVncfqIHYdi7l3CnjV4OEm2J2MIMkS4MuN5y41H_Me8hadAso9R39-A_vfk_je29sdmTrga8lyb1jjswxqakg1D3JSN-jMFHwBQqPyb0Nd6bfUGCliXvIGr2-lVyReFWxk1kqAaA0D_MlK1LiBnIdSP71ljgsCofRugg/3c4/RJhcJc7lSHSq6tXg8j4Jig/h4/rC-ITB7-qAwuIov2RQ7dG-FxEyWHP7d1JRnbR0nCWcA) | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor

subject: It's time to unmask California, but Gavin's decided to play politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc3525 Del Mar Heights Rd # 1077San Diego, CA 92130-2199
body:
Politics or public health? John calls the question: what is the real reason Newsom is refusing to drop the mask mandate? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e6da6b6ed229/8jt85jsn9d-4919154?e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=46383e5dd6&e=b8a6795190)
| [Donate Now](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=8c7bbc3d0f&e=b8a6795190)
---
# Meet the Beast Bus Tour Recap
The Beast Bus roared on during a statewide bus tour, making the case to recall Gavin Newsom, shake up Sacramento, and fix the problems facing California. Watch the video to see a recap of the journey.
* **Miles traveled:** **1,616**
* **Cities visited: 9**
* **Bear sightings: 2**

[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=1bc29f0af7&e=b8a6795190)
# The Beast calls the question: public health or politics?
### Gavin follows the science, but only when it suits him.
This week, Newsom’s true colors were revealed once again. After the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) [announced](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=a2c5a14c6d&e=b8a6795190) that fully vaccinated individuals no longer had to wear masks, Gavin sent Mark Ghaly, California Health & Human Services Agency Secretary, to deliver the bad news: **California will mandate masks for another four weeks**. In contrast, **the other West Coast states** are all following the science.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=ebfdd2fbfa&e=b8a6795190)
Meanwhile, Gavin Newsom’s spending spree is proof that Californians are overtaxed. And despite a**** $75.7 billion tax revenue “surplus”, **Newsom chose to deny funding for local public health officials** responsible for steering the state’s COVID-19 response. Instead, Newsom’s status quo politics prevailed, demonstrated through his $309 million giveaway to forgive traffic violations. Voters are starting to see Gavin’s “benevolence” for what it really is: buying votes.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=c9c6f8b5a6&e=b8a6795190)
|
---
**In a release earlier this week, John Cox made the following statement:**
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=344bbea3f9&e=b8a6795190)
|
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=cc9abc4232&e=b8a6795190)
|
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=3ca22a997b&e=b8a6795190)
## Liberals and tech billionaires go on the attack
**John Cox is leading in the polls and less than 50% of voters are standing by Newsom.** Democrats are getting nervous, so they are getting millions from megadonors like Reed Hastings, Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and George Soros. John needs your financial support more than ever to hold the lead and fend off attacks from Newsom.
| [Donate Now](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=1940e485d8&e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=1216e2b763&e=b8a6795190)
### [VoteForTheBeast.com](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=d636404f08&e=b8a6795190)
| | | | [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=1636937694&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=78f39014ca&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=9145735efa&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=9e48d24ec1&e=b8a6795190)
---|---|---|---
## [About the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=d71d8f4d50&e=b8a6795190)
John is a businessman - **a self-made political outsider** \- with big plans to **shake-up Sacramento** and cut taxes to save California.As someone who **doesn't owe the establishment anything** , John will work for the people of California to cut taxes, eliminate homelessness, make housing more affordable, and get our kids back in school.**California is out of control thanks to career politicians** and insiders who look out for their own interests, rather than those of the average Californian.John built his business from the ground up and **understands the needs of Californians in a way the career politicians who are running this state into the ground never will**. John’s had to scratch and claw to survive and succeed, and he's ready to fight for you.
| | | Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc3525 Del Mar Heights Rd # 1077San Diego, CA 92130-2199

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: We can't go back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
If Maggie loses, Democrats will lose the Senate majority. | | |
---
Folks, it’s no secret that Mitch McConnell is going to do whatever it takes to block any progress. He said it himself: 100% of his focus is stopping the Biden administration. And Mitch McConnell’s number one target for taking back the Senate? You guessed it: Maggie Hassan. name: John Burke
subject: What budget surplus?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
Governor Newsom’s rosy picture of California’s finances isn’t exactly that truth ... Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c7deff6141a8b274/22191d8215520798c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, Have you been hearing about that huge budget “surplus” Gavin Newsom has been bragging about in California? _**It turns out that it’s a complete and total fabrication.**_ The nonpartisan Legislative Analyst Office called it “shortsighted and inadvisable,” because apparently, it relies on $12 BILLION drawn from our reserves and borrowed from other sources. You can’t go into debt and then claim to have a surplus — if families ran their finances this way, they’d be out on the streets in no time! Take a look at this _LA Times_ headline: [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c7deff6141a8b274/f5456451fe2b5fedc3d6b838967d376c/34943) **[You can read the whole article by CLICKING HERE.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c7deff6141a8b274/3b3e5f7421409d01c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** How about instead of spending down our rainy-day fund in California for Newsom’s “re-elect me please” spending binge, we get to work electing a REAL leader who will put people over politics? **If you’re sick of Newsom and the one-party rule out of Sacramento, please[share this article](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c7deff6141a8b274/41dbd13cb551e1bfc3d6b838967d376c/34943) and help us shine a light on the blatant corruption. ** Thanks for helping spread the word,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c7deff6141a8b274/87a36e4711b97912c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c7deff6141a8b274/f15ec6621224f12dc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c7deff6141a8b274/ddcd4febe4eb92fac3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/c7deff6141a8b274/af60f2a27ce410d5c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

Read more >> Peter, Have you been hearing about that huge budget “surplus” Gavin Newsom has been bragging about in California? It turns out that it’s a complete and total fabrication. The nonpartisan Legislative Analyst Office called it “shortsighted and inadvisable,” because apparently, it relies on $12 BILLION drawn from our reserves and borrowed from other sources. You can’t go into debt and then claim to have a surplus — if families ran their finances this way, they’d be out on the streets in no time! Take a look at this LA Times headline: How about instead of spending down our rainy-day fund in California for Newsom’s “re-elect me please” spending binge, we get to work electing a REAL leader who will put people over politics? If you’re sick of Newsom and the one-party rule out of Sacramento, please and help us shine a light on the blatant corruption. clean_body: Fox News is DOMINATING MSNBC in the ratings... | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | Lawrence O’Donnell is a strong defender of the truth and one of the most trusted voices on cable news today. Unfortunately, voices like his are so often drowned out by extreme right-wingers like Tucker Carlson and Sean Hannity on Fox News. MSNBC slipped in the cable ratings last month while Fox was the most watched primetime and daytime network. | | | We’re only sampling [15] people in Pennsylvania, so please respond promptly! \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz Research Team | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you.
